add_namespace = russia
add_namespace = russiaflavor

#Navalny Admitted to Hospital
country_event = {
    id = russia.1
    title = russia.1.t
    desc = russia.1.d
    picture = GFX_Navalny

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = russia.1.a
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_election_approval_rating_nav_var_temp
            value = 0.025
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_nav = yes
        hidden_effect = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_liberal
                popularity = 0.025
            }
        }
    }
}

#Navalny Protests
country_event = {
    id = russia.2
    title = russia.2.t
    desc = russia.2.d
    picture = GFX_Navalny_Protests_Country

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = russia.2.a
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_navalny_protests_government_tooltip
        add_stability = -0.05
        news_event = { id = news.141 hours = 5 }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_election_approval_rating_nav_var_temp
            value = 0.07
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_nav = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_election_approval_rating_ur_var_temp
            value = -0.05
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_ur = yes
        add_timed_idea = {
            idea = SOV_navalny_protests_idea
            days = 365
        }

        hidden_effect = {
            set_country_flag = SOV_navalny_protests
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_liberal
                popularity = 0.03
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = market_liberal
                popularity = 0.03
            }
            country_event = { id = russiaflavor.35 days = 7 }
        }
    }
}

            value = -0.02
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_ur = yes

        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_cprf = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_election_approval_rating_nav_var_temp
            value = 0.02
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_nav = yes
    }
}

#Police Breaking up Rallies
country_event = {
    id = russia.12
    title = russia.12.t
    desc = russia.12.d
    picture = GFX_Russian_Police_MVD

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = russia.12.a
        add_stability = -0.05
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_election_approval_rating_nav_var_temp
            value = 0.03
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_nav = yes
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_ai_behavior option = CPRF }
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_election_approval_rating_cprf_var_temp
            value = 1
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_cprf = yes
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_ai_behavior option = LDPR }
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_election_approval_rating_ldpr_var_temp
            value = 1
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_ldpr = yes
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_ai_behavior option = UNITED_RUSSIA }
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_election_approval_rating_ur_var_temp
            value = 1
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_ur = yes
    }
}

        effect_tooltip = {
            add_ideas = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea4
        }

    }

#Mishustin announces early election
country_event = {
    id = russia.44
    title = russia.44.t
    desc = russia.44.d
    picture = GFX_Mishustin

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            country_event = { id = russia.75 days = 7 }
            country_event = { id = russia.45 days = 10 }
            complete_national_focus = SOV_post_putin_elections
            if = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = {
                        OR = {
                            has_country_flag = SOV_afonin_selected_flag
                            has_country_flag = SOV_grudinin_selected_flag
                            has_country_flag = SOV_levchenko_selected_flag
                        }
                    }
                }
                promote_character = {
                    character = SOV_nikolay_kharitonov
                    ideology = marxism_leninism
                }
            }
        }
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.44.a
    }
}

#Election Preparations
country_event = {
    id = russia.45
    title = russia.45.t
    desc = russia.45.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_presidential_elections

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = { #cprf
        name = russia.45.a
        ai_chance = {
            factor = 5
            modifier = {
                factor = 10000
                has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_ai_behavior option = CPRF }
            }
        }
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_side_cprf
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_elections_started
        activate_mission = alliance_with_srzp_mission
        set_country_flag = SOV_sided_with_cprf_flag
        complete_national_focus = SOV_new_revolution
        hidden_effect = {
            activate_mission = SOV_countdown_day_mission
            activate_mission = SOV_opposition_growth_mission
            country_event = { id = russia.54 days = 30 }
            country_event = { id = russia.12 days = 50 }
            country_event = { id = russia.13 days = 20 }
            country_event = { id = russia.14 days = 70 }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_ai_behavior option = CPRF }
                }
                set_temp_variable = {
                    var = SOV_election_approval_rating_cprf_var_temp
                    value = 1
                }
                SOV_add_election_approval_rating_cprf = yes
            }
        }

            add_ideas = SOV_Slutsky
            add_ideas = SOV_Abelstev

            remove_ideas = SOV_Putinism_Faltering3
            remove_ideas = SOV_Putinism_Faltering4

            remove_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_oligarch_support_dynamic
            }
        }

            }

        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_grudinin_selected_flag }
            swap_ruler_traits = { remove = hos_peoples_candidate add = hos_peoples_president }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_levchenko_selected_flag }
            swap_ruler_traits = { remove = hos_red_governor add = hos_red_president }
        }
        else = {
            add_political_power = 25
        }
    }
}

#Invitation to join USSR
country_event = {
    id = russia.59
    title = russia.59.t
    desc = russia.59.d
    picture = GFX_report_event_russian_flag
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            clear_global_event_target = SOV_soviet_union_conference_member
            save_global_event_target_as = SOV_soviet_union_conference_member
        }
    }
    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = { #accept
        name = russia.59.a
        set_country_flag = SOV_peaceful_annexation
        clr_country_flag = SOV_invasion_target_flag
        SOV = {
            country_event = { id = russia.1541 days = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                tag = ARM
            }
            annex_country = {
                target = NGK
            }
        }
        ai_chance = {
            base = 20
            modifier = {
                add = 150
                AND = {
                    tag = KAZ
                    has_government = authoritarian_democrat
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 150
                AND = {
                    tag = KAZ
                    has_government = conservative
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 250
                AND = {
                    tag = KAZ
                    has_government = libertarian_socialist
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = -65
                AND = {
                    tag = BLR
                    has_government = social_democrat
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 350
                AND = {
                    tag = KAZ
                    has_government = nationalist
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 50
                tag = ARM
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 50
                AND = {
                    tag = KYR
                    has_government = social_democrat
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 45
                has_country_flag = SOV_ADS_member_flag
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 60
                has_country_flag = SOV_second_attempt_flag
            }
        }
    }

    option = { #decline
        name = russia.59.b
        set_country_flag = SOV_invasion_target_flag
        SOV = {
            country_event = { id = russia.1542 days = 1 }
        }
        ai_chance = {
            base = 10
            modifier = {
                add = -17
                has_country_flag = SOV_second_attempt_flag
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 100
                AND = {
                    tag = KAZ
                    has_government = social_liberal
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 30
                AND = {
                    tag = KYR
                    has_government = conservative
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 30
                AND = {
                    tag = GEO
                    has_government = social_liberal
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 150
                AND = {
                    tag = BLR
                    has_government = social_democrat
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 5
                AND = {
                    tag = TAJ
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                add = 5
                AND = {
                    tag = AZR
                }
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 0
                AND = {
                    tag = BLR
                    NOT = {
                        has_government = social_democrat
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

#Your fate is determined here...
country_event = {
    id = russia.72
    title = russia.72.t
    desc = russia.72.d
    picture = GFX_Kazakh_Riots_Quelled

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    SOV = {
                        divisions_in_state = {
                            size > 3
                            state = 590
                        }
                    }
                }
                random_list = {
                    40 = {
                        modifier = {
                            factor = 0
                            OR = {
                                has_game_rule = {
                                    rule = The_Kazakhstan_Riots
                                    option = The_Kazakhstan_Riots_2
                                }
                                has_game_rule = {
                                    rule = The_Kazakhstan_Riots
                                    option = The_Kazakhstan_Riots_3
                                }
                                has_game_rule = {
                                    rule = The_Kazakhstan_Riots
                                    option = The_Kazakhstan_Riots_4

                    ideology = nationalist
                    popularity = 0.15
                }

                load_oob = "KAZ_conscripts"
            }
        }
    }

        name = russia.73.a

            country_event = { id = russia.205 days = 90 }
        }
    }

#Build civilian factory in state
country_event = {
    id = russia.101
    title = russia.101.t
    desc = russia.101.d
    picture = GFX_Generic_Oligarchs

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {

    }
    trigger = {
        NOT = {
            has_country_flag = SOV_duma_category_disabled
        }
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.101.a #accept
        ai_chance = {
            factor = 0
        }
        unlock_decision_tooltip = { decision = SOV_invest_in_state_factory show_effect_tooltip = yes }
        event_target:SOV_oligarchs_investment_state = {
            set_state_flag = SOV_oligarchs_build_factory
            set_variable = { factory_goal = industrial_complex_level }
            add_to_variable = { factory_goal = 1 }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.101.b #refuse
        ai_chance = {
            factor = 100
        }
        ROOT = { clr_country_flag = SOV_oligarchs_investment }
        clear_global_event_target = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_oligarch_approval_rating_var_temp
            value = -0.03
        }
        SOV_add_oligarch_approval_rating = yes
    }
}

# Oligarch wants investment in their state - hidden dispatch event
country_event = {
    id = russia.102
    hidden = yes
    is_triggered_only = yes
    trigger = {
        tag = SOV
        NOT = {
            OR = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_duma_category_disabled
                has_completed_focus = SOV_election_victory
                has_completed_focus = SOV_triumph_of_zhirinovsky
                has_completed_focus = SOV_russian_victory
                has_country_leader = {
                    character = SOV_alexei_navalny
                    ruling_only = yes
                }
            }
        }
    }

    immediate = {
        set_country_flag = SOV_oligarchs_investment
        if = {
            limit = { has_event_target = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state }
            clear_global_event_target = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state
        }
        random_list = {
            60 = {
                modifier = {
                    NOT = {
                        any_owned_state = {
                            is_core_of = ROOT
                            is_controlled_by = ROOT
                            free_building_slots = {
                                building = industrial_complex
                                size > 0
                                include_locked = no
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    factor = 0
                }
                random_owned_state = {
                    limit = {
                        is_core_of = ROOT
                        is_controlled_by = ROOT
                        free_building_slots = {
                            building = industrial_complex
                            size > 0
                            include_locked = no
                        }
                    }

                    save_global_event_target_as = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state
                    state_event = { id = russia.101 trigger_for = controller }
                }
            }
            40 = {
                modifier = {
                    NOT = {
                        any_owned_state = {
                            is_core_of = ROOT
                            is_controlled_by = ROOT
                            free_building_slots = {
                                building = arms_factory
                                size > 0
                                include_locked = no
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    factor = 0
                }
                modifier = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_build_up_western_military_district_UR
                    factor = 2
                }
                random_owned_state = {
                    limit = {
                        is_core_of = ROOT
                        is_controlled_by = ROOT
                        free_building_slots = {
                            building = arms_factory
                            size > 0
                            include_locked = no
                        }
                    }
                    save_global_event_target_as = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state
                    state_event = { id = russia.103 trigger_for = controller }
                }
            }
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            country_event = { id = russia.102 days = 365 random_days = 10 }
        }
    }
}

    desc = russia.108.d
    picture = GFX_Victory_Day_Parade

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            country_event = { id = russia.108 days = 365 }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_election_victory
                }
                country_event = { id = russia.402 days = 182 }
            }
            else_if = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_election_victory }
                    has_war = no
                }
                country_event = { id = russia.401 days = 180 }
            }
            else_if = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_election_victory }
                    OR = {
                        has_war_with = UKR
                        has_war_with = GER
                    }
                }
                country_event = { id = russia.404 days = 180 }
            }
        }
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.108.a
        army_experience = 10
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_war = yes
            }
            add_war_support = 0.03
        }
    }
}

#Generals Awarded Medals
country_event = {
    id = russia.118
    title = russia.118.t
    desc = russia.118.d
    picture = GFX_Generals_Awarded

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            set_temp_variable = { SOV_pp = SOV.political_power }
            set_temp_variable = { SOV_army_xp = SOV.army_experience }
            set_temp_variable = { SOV_air_xp = SOV.air_experience }
            set_temp_variable = { SOV_navy_xp = SOV.navy_experience }
            multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_pp = -1 }
            multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_army_xp = -1 }
            multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_air_xp = -1 }
            multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_navy_xp = -1 }
            add_political_power = SOV_pp
            army_experience = SOV_army_xp
            navy_experience = SOV_air_xp
            air_experience = SOV_navy_xp
        }
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.118.a
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    has_global_flag = SOV_cprf_won
                }
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_viktor_zolotov
                slot = corps_commander
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_soviet_union
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_victor_sobolev
                slot = corps_commander
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_soviet_union
            }
            add_trait = {

                trait = trait_SOV_hero_soviet_union
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_valery_gerasimov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_soviet_union
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_oleg_salyukov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_soviet_union
            }
            add_trait = {

                trait = trait_SOV_hero_soviet_union
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_viktor_zolotov
                slot = corps_commander
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_russian_federation
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_aleksandr_dvornikov
                slot = corps_commander
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_russian_federation
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_valery_gerasimov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_russian_federation
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_oleg_salyukov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_russian_federation
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_sergey_shoygu
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_hero_russian_federation
            }
        }
    }

                days = 350

        }

            set_demilitarized_zone = no

            target = TRA
            autonomous_state = autonomy_ssr
        }

            TRA = {
                set_popularities = {
                    communist = 100
                }
                set_politics = {
                    ruling_party = communist
                }
                set_cosmetic_tag = TRA_ssr
                change_government_type_communist_party_state = yes
                change_economy_type_socialist_market = yes
                leave_faction = yes

                limit = {
                    MOL = {
                        has_government = libertarian_socialist
                    }
                }

                    id = russia.122 days = 100 random_days = 20
                }
            }

        }

            SOV = {
                add_to_faction = TRA
            }
            TRA = {
                set_capital = { state = 78 }

                every_controlled_state = {
                    limit = {
                        is_core_of = MOL
                    }
                    add_core_of = TRA
                }
                kill_country_leader = yes
                create_country_leader = {
                    name = MOL_igor_dodon_char
                    picture = "gfx/Leaders/MOL/Igor_Dodon.dds"
                    ideology = market_socialism
                }

            }
            set_country_flag = SOV_moldova_pro_russian
            change_government_type_socialist_republic = yes
        }
    }

        }
    }

        name = russia.131.a

            add_popularity = {

                popularity = -0.10
            }
            add_popularity = {

                popularity = 0.10
            }

                popularity = 0.15
            }
            set_party_name = { ideology = conservative long_name = SOV_authoritarian_democrat_long name = SOV_authoritarian_democrat_short }
            set_party_name = { ideology = communist long_name = SOV_medvedev_communist_party_long name = SOV_medvedev_communist_party_short }

            set_party_name = { ideology = social_democrat long_name = SOV_medvedev_socdem_party_long name = SOV_medvedev_socdem_party_short }
            set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:conservative  }
            add_to_coalition = yes
            SOV_remove_cprf_party = yes
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_duma_srzp_mironov

            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_democrat
                popularity = 0.10
            }
            custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_duma_srzp_mironov
                add_idea = SOV_duma_people_russia_mironov
            }

            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = conservative
                popularity = 0.45
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.1
            }

                ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                popularity = 0.02
            }

            set_party_name = { ideology = authoritarian_democrat long_name = SOV_medvedev_authdem_party_long name = SOV_medvedev_authdem_party_short }

    title = russia.189.t
    desc = russia.189.d
    picture = GFX_lukashenko

    immediate = {
    }

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = russia.189.b
        release_puppet = BLR
        hidden_effect = {
            BLR = {
                set_popularities = {
                    fascist = 2
                    authoritarian_democrat = 1
                    conservative = 12
                    market_liberal = 8
                    social_liberal = 9
                    social_democrat = 10
                    nationalist = 8
                    libertarian_socialist = 33
                    communist = 14
                    totalitarian_socialist = 3
                }
                set_cosmetic_tag = BLR_ssr
                remove_ideas = {
                    BLR_Crushing_Zmagar_Opposition_idea
                    BLR_Democratization_of_Belarus_idea
                    BLR_Rising_Zmagars_idea
                    BLR_Lukashenko_rule_idea
                    BLR_Lukashenkonomics_idea
                }
                add_ideas = {
                    BLR_Dawn_of_Red_Belarus_idea
                }
                load_oob = "BLR_2020"
            }
            every_controlled_state = {
                limit = {
                    is_core_of = BLR
                }
                remove_core_of = SOV
            }
            remove_ideas = {
                SOV_union_state1
                SOV_union_state2
            }
            every_unit_leader = {
                if = {
                    limit = { has_trait = trait_BLR_SOV }
                    set_nationality = SOV
                }
            }
            delete_unit_template_and_units = {
                division_template = "Motastralkovaya Brigada"
                disband = yes
            }
            delete_unit_template_and_units = {
                division_template = "Mabilnaya Brigada"
                disband = yes
            }
            delete_unit_template_and_units = {
                division_template = "Brigada Spetsnaz"
                disband = yes
            }
            delete_unit_template_and_units = {
                division_template = "Asobny Mekhanizavany Batalyon"
                disband = yes
            }
        }
        add_political_power = 75
        add_stability = 0.075
        add_power_balance_value = {
            id = SOV_communist_party_balance
            value = 0.075
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.189.a
        release_puppet = BLR
        hidden_effect = {
            BLR = {
                country_event = { id = belarus.3 }
                set_cosmetic_tag = BLR_ssr
                load_oob = "BLR_2020"
            }
            every_controlled_state = {
                limit = {
                    is_core_of = BLR
                }
                remove_core_of = SOV
            }
            remove_ideas = {
                SOV_union_state1
                SOV_union_state2
            }
            every_unit_leader = {
                if = {
                    limit = { has_trait = trait_BLR_SOV }
                    set_nationality = SOV
                }
            }
            delete_unit_template_and_units = {
                division_template = "Motastralkovaya Brigada"
                disband = yes
            }
            delete_unit_template_and_units = {
                division_template = "Mabilnaya Brigada"
                disband = yes
            }
            delete_unit_template_and_units = {
                division_template = "Brigada Spetsnaz"
                disband = yes
            }
            delete_unit_template_and_units = {
                division_template = "Asobny Mekhanizavany Batalyon"
                disband = yes
            }
        }
        add_political_power = 50
        add_stability = 0.05
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.189.c
        add_power_balance_value = {
            id = SOV_communist_party_balance
            value = -0.075
        }
    }
}

    desc = russia.191.d

    immediate = {
    }

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = { #Favor Anti-Globalist Leftists
        name = russia.191.a
        SOV = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = totalitarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.05
            }
        }
        every_country = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = global_ass_lol
            }

            add_stability = -0.05

            add_popularity = {
                ideology = totalitarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.05
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.04
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.03
            }
        }
    }
    option = { #Favor The New Right
        name = russia.191.b

        SOV = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = national_socialist
                popularity = 0.05
            }
        }
        every_country = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = global_ass_lol
            }

            add_stability = -0.05

            add_popularity = {
                ideology = national_socialist
                popularity = 0.05
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = fascist
                popularity = 0.04
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = nationalist
                popularity = 0.03
            }
        }
    }
}

    id = russia.192
    title = russia.192.t
    desc = russia.192.d
    picture = GFX_TFR_Just_Russia_merging

    immediate = {
    }

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = russia.192.a
        set_temp_variable = {

            value = 0.02
        }
        SOV_add_election_approval_rating_srzp = yes
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = conservative
            long_name = SOV_JR_FT_conservative_party_long
            name = SOV_JR_FT_conservative_party_short
        }
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = social_democrat
            long_name = SOV_JR_FT_conservative_party_long
            name = SOV_JR_FT_conservative_party_short
        }
        set_country_flag = SOV_srzp_merged_flag
        custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        swap_ideas = {
            remove_idea = SOV_duma_jr_mironov
            add_idea = SOV_duma_srzp_mironov
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            remove_country_leader_role = {
                character = SOV_zakhar_prilepin
                ideology = conservative_socialism
            }
            add_country_leader_role = {
                character = SOV_sergei_mironov
                promote_leader = yes
                country_leader = {
                    ideology = conservative_socialism
                    expire = "1.1.1.1"
                    traits = {
                    }
                }
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = conservative
                popularity = 0.02
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_democrat
                popularity = 0.02
            }
        }
    }
}

country_event = {
    id = russia.195
    title = russia.195.t
    desc = russia.195.d
    picture = GFX_russia_1

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = russia.195.b
        news_event = { id = news.242 }
        set_party_name = { ideology = authoritarian_democrat long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_conservatives_long name = SOV_medvedev_apf_conservatives }
        set_party_name = { ideology = conservative long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_conservatives_long  name = SOV_medvedev_apf_conservatives }
        set_party_name = { ideology = social_democrat long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_socialists_long name = SOV_medvedev_apf_socialists_short }
        set_party_name = { ideology = communist long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_socialists_long name = SOV_medvedev_apf_socialists_short }
        set_party_name = { ideology = libertarian_socialist long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_socialists_long name = SOV_medvedev_apf_socialists_short }
        set_party_name = { ideology = fascist long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_nationalists_long name = SOV_medvedev_apf_nationalists_short }
        set_party_name = { ideology = nationalist long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_nationalists_long name = SOV_medvedev_apf_nationalists_short }
        set_party_name = { ideology = market_liberal long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_liberals_long name = SOV_medvedev_apf_liberals_short }
        set_party_name = { ideology = social_liberal long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_liberals_long name = SOV_medvedev_apf_liberals_short }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_oligarch_approval_rating_var_temp
            value = -0.75
        }
        set_country_leader_ideology = putinism
        SOV_add_oligarch_approval_rating = yes
        set_country_flag = SOV_medve_oligarchs_disabled
        hidden_effect = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.05
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_democrat
                popularity = 0.1
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = market_liberal
                popularity = 0.05
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_liberal
                popularity = 0.1
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = conservative
                popularity = 0.1
            }
            set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:nationalist }
            add_to_coalition = yes
        }
    }
}

        set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:fascist  }
        add_to_coalition = yes
        hidden_effect = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = fascist
                popularity = -1
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = fascist
                popularity = 0.085
            }
        }
    }
}

#Terrorists in Western Ukraine and Baltics
country_event = {
    id = russia.228
    title = russia.228.t
    desc = russia.228.d
    picture = GFX_Generic_SOBR

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            #Ukraine
            if = {
                limit = { UKR = { exists = no } }
                73 = {
                    remove_core_of = SOV
                    add_resistance = 30
                }
                89 = {
                    remove_core_of = SOV
                    add_resistance = 60
                }
                91 = {
                    remove_core_of = SOV
                    add_resistance = 40
                }
                93 = {
                    remove_core_of = SOV
                    add_resistance = 30
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = { EST = { exists = no } }
                every_controlled_state = {
                    if = {
                        limit = { is_core_of = EST }
                        remove_core_of = SOV
                        add_resistance = 40
                    }
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = { LAT = { exists = no } }
                every_controlled_state = {
                    if = {
                        limit = { is_core_of = LAT }
                        remove_core_of = SOV
                        add_resistance = 40
                    }
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = { LIT = { exists = no } }
                every_controlled_state = {
                    if = {
                        limit = { is_core_of = LIT }
                        remove_core_of = SOV
                        add_resistance = 40
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.228.a
        hidden_effect = {
            set_country_flag = SOV_soviet_cto
        }
        unlock_decision_category_tooltip = SOV_western_states_terrorists_category
        add_political_power = 100
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = society_development_var_temp
            value = -0.10
        }
        add_society_development = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = industrial_development_var_temp
            value = -0.10
        }
        add_industrial_development = yes
    }
}

    desc = russia.238.d
    picture = GFX_Navalny_speech

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.238.a
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = libertarian_socialist
            popularity = 0.05
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = social_liberal
            popularity = 0.05
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = social_democrat
            popularity = 0.025
        }
        add_stability = 0.05
        add_war_support = 0.1
        remove_ideas = { SOV_fratricidal_war }
        hidden_effect = {
            set_country_flag = SOV_navalny_supports_smo
        }
    }
}

#Patriotic Games
country_event = {
    id = russia.239
    title = russia.239.t
    desc = russia.239.d
    picture = GFX_generic_lenin

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.239.a
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = debt_var_temp
            value = 0.5
        }
        add_debt = yes
        random_list = {
            10 = {
                country_event = { id = russia.240 days = 360 random_days = 40 }
            }
            10 = {
                country_event = { id = russia.241 days = 360 random_days = 40 }
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.239.b
    }
}

#Patriotic Games - Game is good
country_event = {
    id = russia.240
    title = russia.240.t
    desc = russia.240.d
    picture = GFX_Soviet_cool_game

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.240.a
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = society_development_var_temp
            value = 0.01
        }
        add_society_development = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = income_var_temp
            value = 3
        }
        add_income = yes
    }
}

    picture = GFX_Soviet_bad_game

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.241.a
        add_political_power = -5
    }
}

#Looting the Steel Crown
country_event = {
    id = russia.245
    title = russia.245.t
    desc = russia.245.d
    picture = GFX_Steel_Crown

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.245.a
        add_political_power = -5
        random_country_division = {
            limit = {
                division_has_battalion_in_template = mot_militia
                division_has_battalion_in_template = mechanized
                division_has_battalion_in_template = modern_armor
                is_unit_template_reserves = no
            }
            add_history_entry = {
                key = "Partook in the looting of the Steel Crown of Carol I."
                subject = "Division Honor"
                allow = yes
            }
        }
    }
}

#Soviet Election 1
country_event = {
    id = russia.246
    title = russia.246.t
    desc = russia.246.d

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    trigger = {
        NOT = {
            has_country_flag = SOV_abolish_post_of_president_flag
        }
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.246.a
        trigger = {
            has_country_flag = SOV_afonin_selected_flag
            NOT = {
                OR = {
                    has_country_flag = SOV_congress_2_afonin_elected
                }
            }
        }
        effect_tooltip = {
            promote_character = {
                character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                ideology = marxism_leninism
            }
            promote_character = {
                character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                ideology = communist_populism
            }
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            SOV_yuri_afonin = {
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = market_socialism
                }
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = left_nationalism
                }
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = marxism_leninism
                }
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = communist_populism
                }
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = post_leftism
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_renewed_program_flag_1
                        has_completed_focus = SOV_pragmatic_approach
                    }
                }
                add_country_leader_role = {
                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                    promote_leader = yes
                    country_leader = {
                        ideology = market_socialism
                        traits = { hos_initiative_apparatchik hos_powerless_president }
                    }
                }
            }
            else_if = {
                limit = {
                    has_country_flag = SOV_renewed_program_flag_2
                }
                add_country_leader_role = {
                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                    promote_leader = yes
                    country_leader = {
                        ideology = left_nationalism
                        traits = { hos_initiative_apparatchik hos_powerless_president }
                    }
                }
            }
            else = {
                add_country_leader_role = {
                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                    promote_leader = yes
                    country_leader = {
                        ideology = marxism_leninism
                        traits = { hos_initiative_apparatchik hos_powerless_president }
                    }
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        has_completed_focus = SOV_reinvent_democracy
                    }
                }
                add_country_leader_role = {
                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                    promote_leader = yes
                    country_leader = {
                        ideology = post_leftism
                        traits = { hos_initiative_apparatchik hos_powerless_president }
                    }
                }
            }
            else = {
                add_country_leader_role = {
                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                    promote_leader = yes
                    country_leader = {
                        ideology = communist_populism
                        traits = { hos_initiative_apparatchik hos_powerless_president }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.246.b
        trigger = {
            OR = {
                AND = {
                    has_country_flag = SOV_congress_rashkin_elected

                }
            }
            if = {

                    }
                }

                    character = SOV_sergey_levchenko
                    promote_leader = yes

                    }
                }
            }

#Soviet Election 2
country_event = {
    id = russia.247
    title = russia.247.t
    desc = russia.247.d
    picture = GFX_APLA_Congress

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = { #Parfenov
        name = russia.247.a
        trigger = {
            #has_country_flag = SOV_united_candidate
            always = no
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_government = libertarian_socialist
            }
            hidden_effect = {
                retire_ideology_leader = libertarian_socialist
                promote_character = {
                    character = SOV_denis_parfenov
                    ideology = eurocommunism
                }
            }

            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.1
            }
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = libertarian_socialist
                elections_allowed = yes
                #last_election = "[GetDateStringNoHour]"
                election_frequency = 48
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_government = communist
                NOT = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_class_unity
                }
            }
            hidden_effect = {
                retire_ideology_leader = communist
                promote_character = {
                    character = SOV_denis_parfenov
                    ideology = marxism_leninism
                }
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.1
            }
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = communist
                elections_allowed = yes
                #last_election = "[GetDateStringNoHour]"
                election_frequency = 48
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_government = communist
                has_completed_focus = SOV_class_unity
            }
            hidden_effect = {
                retire_ideology_leader = communist
                promote_character = {
                    character = SOV_denis_parfenov
                    ideology = market_socialism
                }
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.1
            }
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = communist
                elections_allowed = yes
                #last_election = "[GetDateStringNoHour]"
                election_frequency = 48
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_government = communist
                has_country_leader_ideology = left_nationalism
            }
            hidden_effect = {
                retire_ideology_leader = communist
                promote_character = {
                    character = SOV_denis_parfenov
                    ideology = left_nationalism
                }

country_event = {
    id = russia.259
    title = russia.259.t
    desc = russia.259.d
    picture = GFX_Transnistria

    immediate = {
    }

    option = { #Join Novorossiya
        name = russia.259.a
        add_political_power = -15
        trigger = {
            NOV = {
                exists = yes
            }
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            MOL = {
                transfer_state = 78
                set_country_flag = csto_member
                set_party_name = { ideology = authoritarian_democrat long_name = MOL_pobeda_long name = MOL_pobeda }
            }
            puppet = MOL
            78 = {
                remove_core_of = TRA
            }
            857 = {
                remove_core_of = TRA
            }
        }
        NOV = {
            annex_country = {
                target = TRA
                transfer_troops = yes
            }
            add_state_core = 857
        }
        add_state_core = 857
    }
    option = { #New Moldova Project
        name = russia.259.b
        trigger = {
            MOL = {
                is_puppet_of = SOV
            }
        }
        add_political_power = -100
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_tra_new_moldova_tt
        hidden_effect = {
            TRA = {
                transfer_state = 78
                transfer_state = 857
                set_capital = { state = 78 }
                add_state_core = 78
                add_state_core = 857
                set_cosmetic_tag = TRA_federation
            }
            TRA = {
                get_current_government_type = yes
            }
            puppet = TRA
            TRA = {
                restore_previous_government_type = yes
            }
        }
    }
    option = { #if novorussia annexed
        name = russia.259.c
        add_political_power = -25
        trigger = {
            NOV = {
                exists = no
            }
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            MOL = {
                transfer_state = 78
                set_country_flag = csto_member
            }
            puppet = MOL
            78 = {
                remove_core_of = TRA
            }
            857 = {
                remove_core_of = TRA
            }
        }
        annex_country = {
            target = TRA
            transfer_troops = yes
        }
        add_state_core = 857
    }
}

        }
    }

        name = russia.324.a
        trigger = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_ADS_member_flag }
        }
        ai_chance = {
            factor = 5
            modifier = {
                factor = 10
                tag = KAZ
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 10
                tag = ARM
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 100
                tag = MON
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 100
                tag = SWZ
            }
        }
        SOV_join_ADS = yes
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    original_tag = CHL
                    original_tag = BRA
                    original_tag = BOL
                    original_tag = COL
                }
            }
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = libertarian_socialist
                elections_allowed = no
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.2
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                original_tag = MON
            }
            country_event = {
                id = russia.127
                days = 30
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    original_tag = PRU

                    original_tag = SWZ
                    original_tag = ERI
                    original_tag = ZIM
                }
            }
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = communist
                elections_allowed = no
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.2
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_democrat
                popularity = -0.2
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = -0.2
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    original_tag = ERI
                }
                set_country_leader_ideology = marxism_leninism
            }
        }
    }

        name = russia.324.b
        ai_chance = {
            factor = 3
            modifier = {
                factor = 0
                has_government = totalitarian_socialist
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 0
                has_government = communist
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 0
                has_government = libertarian_socialist
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 0
                has_government = social_democrat
            }

                factor = 10
                tag = AZR
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 10
                tag = TAJ
            }
            modifier = {
                factor = 10

            }
        }

    desc = russia.325.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_Predpriyatiye

        original_tag = SOV
        OR = {
            KAZ = {
                is_puppet_of = SOV
            }
            KAZ = {
                exists = no
            }
        }
        SOV = {
            has_completed_focus = SOV_relive_dream_of_the_future
        }
    }
    mean_time_to_happen = {
        days = 75
    }
    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.325.a
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = academic_development_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        add_academic_development = yes
    }
}

                }

#Rashkin book
country_event = {
    id = russia.337
    title = russia.337.t
    desc = russia.337.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_Rashkin_book

    fire_only_once = yes
    is_triggered_only = yes

    trigger = {
    }
    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.337.a
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = {
                    has_global_flag = SOV_first_nato_war_victory
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_idea = SOV_state_atheism
                }
                hidden_effect = {
                    remove_ideas = {
                        SOV_state_atheism
                        SOV_new_soviet_culture
                        SOV_cult_of_lenin
                    }
                    add_ideas = {
                        SOV_Neo_Soviet_Democracy_1
                    }
                }
                custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_neosoviet_democracy_1_tt
                show_ideas_tooltip = SOV_Neo_Soviet_Democracy_1
            }
            else = {
                hidden_effect = {
                    remove_ideas = {
                        SOV_soviet_religious_liberty
                        SOV_new_soviet_culture
                        SOV_cult_of_lenin
                    }
                    add_ideas = {
                        SOV_Neo_Soviet_Democracy
                    }
                }
                custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_neosoviet_democracy_tt
                show_ideas_tooltip = SOV_Neo_Soviet_Democracy
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.05
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_ideas = SOV_Neo_Soviet_Democracy_postwar
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.05
            }
        }
        set_country_flag = SOV_rashkin_book
    }
}

#LDPR may pardon some communists during KNOA leads to some sneaky freaky grudinin
country_event = {
    id = russia.387
    title = russia.387.t
    desc = russia.387.d
    picture = GFX_state_communists

    is_triggered_only = yes
    fire_only_once = yes

    option = { #pardon, lowers KNOA on one level yay
        name = russia.387.a
        add_political_power = -100
        add_power_balance_value = {
            id = SOV_LDPR_balance
            value = -0.05
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = authoritarian_democrat
            popularity = 0.05
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = 0.02
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_idea = SOV_KNOA_idea
            }
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_KNOA_idea
                add_idea = SOV_KNOA_2_idea
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                has_idea = SOV_KNOA_2_idea
            }
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_KNOA_2_idea
                add_idea = SOV_KNOA_3_idea

                    }
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {

                        range = SOV_united_russia_electoral_approval_ok
                    }
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                value = -0.05
            }

                        id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                        range = SOV_people_russia_electoral_approval_good
                    }
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                value = 0.05
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {

                    id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                    range = SOV_ur_middle
                }

                    id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                    value > 0
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                value = -0.05
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {

                }

    desc = russia.451.d
    picture = GFX_medvedev_sad
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {

    }
    option = { #medvechuk stays
        name = russia.451.a
        trigger = {
            NOT = {
                UKR = {
                    has_country_leader = {
                        character = UKR_yuri_boyko
                        ruling_only = yes
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                SOV = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_putinism_with_human_face
                }
            }
            UKR = {
                add_country_leader_role = {
                    character = UKR_viktor_medvedchuk
                    promote_leader = yes
                    country_leader = {
                        ideology = right_populism
                        expire = "1.1.1.1"
                        id=-1
                        traits = { }
                    }
                }
                set_politics = {
                    ruling_party = conservative
                    last_election = "2018.1.1"
                    election_frequency = 48
                    elections_allowed = no
                }
                add_popularity = {
                    ideology = conservative
                    popularity = 0.38
                }
                set_party_name = {
                    ideology = conservative
                    name = UKR_medvechyk_party
                }
            }
        }
        else = {
            UKR = {
                promote_character = {
                    character = UKR_viktor_medvedchuk
                    ideology = hybrid_regime
                }
                set_politics = {
                    ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat
                    last_election = "2018.1.1"
                    election_frequency = 48
                    elections_allowed = no
                }
                add_popularity = {
                    ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                    popularity = 0.05
                }
                set_party_name = {
                    ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                    name = UKR_medvechyk_party
                }
            }
        }
        ai_chance = {
            base = 5
        }
    }
    option = { #murayev elected
        name = russia.451.b
        trigger = {
            NOT = {
                UKR = {
                    has_country_leader = {
                        character = UKR_yuri_boyko
                        ruling_only = yes
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        UKR = {
            promote_character = {
                character = UKR_evgenyy_murayev
                ideology = classical_conservatism
            }
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = conservative

                elections_allowed = no
            }

                ideology = conservative
                popularity = 0.31
            }
            set_party_name = { ideology = conservative long_name = UKR_murayev_party name = UKR_murayev_party }
        }
        ai_chance = {
            base = 3
        }
    }
    option = { #korolevskaya elected

                        elections_allowed = yes
                    }
                    set_party_name = {
                        ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                        long_name = UKR_plp
                        name = UKR_plp_short
                    }
                }
                50 = {
                    add_popularity = {
                        ideology = conservative
                        popularity = 0.35
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        ai_chance = {
            base = 100
        }
    }
}

#Zyuganov ustal
country_event = {
    id = russia.453
    title = russia.453.t
    desc = russia.453.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_House
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            set_country_flag = SOV_zyuganov_retired
            clr_country_flag = head_of_gov_ui_enabled
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_idea = SOV_Zyuganov
                }
                remove_ideas = SOV_Zyuganov
                add_ideas = vacant_hog
            }
            else_if = {
                limit = {
                    has_character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
                }
                retire_character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.453.a
        effect_tooltip = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_idea = SOV_Zyuganov
                }
                remove_ideas = SOV_Zyuganov
            }
            else_if = {
                limit = {
                    has_character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
                }
                retire_character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
            }
        }
    }
}

    desc = russia.454.d

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        set_country_flag = SOV_medvedev_elections_end
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.454.a
        trigger = {
            OR = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_chosen_patrushev_flag
                has_country_flag = SOV_chosen_volodin_flag
                has_country_flag = SOV_chosen_shoygu_flag
                has_country_flag = SOV_chosen_naryshkin_flag
            }
            is_power_balance_in_range = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance

                    id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance

                }
            }
        }

        }

#novorossiya talks finalized
country_event = {
    id = russia.473
    title = {
        text = russia.473.t1
        trigger = {
            OR = {
                NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_recognize_donbas }
                NOT =  { has_completed_focus = SOV_the_time_is_now }
            }
        }
    }
    title = {
        text = russia.473.t2
        trigger = {
            OR = {
                has_completed_focus = SOV_recognize_donbas
                has_completed_focus = SOV_the_time_is_now
            }
        }
    }
    desc = russia.473.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_donbas_3
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            set_country_flag = SOV_novorossiya_formed_flag
            NOV = {
                add_ideas = {
                    NOV_united_novorossiya_idea
                    NOV_donbas_economy_idea
                    NOV_army_of_novorossiya_idea
                }
            }
            news_event = { id = news.320 hours = 6 }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.473.a
        NOV = {
            add_ideas = {
                NOV_united_novorossiya_idea
                NOV_donbas_economy_idea
                NOV_army_of_novorossiya_idea
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_recognize_donbas }
            add_political_power = -100
        }
        if = {
            limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_the_time_is_now }
            add_political_power = -100
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            NOV = {
                remove_ideas = NOV_lugansk_economy_idea
                remove_ideas = NOV_lugansk_reform_frenzy_idea
                remove_ideas = NOV_peoples_militia_idea
            }
            if = {
                limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_recognize_donbas }
                NOV = {
                    set_cosmetic_tag = NOV_unified
                    set_party_name = {
                        ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                        long_name = NOV_authdem_united_party
                        name = NOV_authdem_united_party
                    }
                    promote_character = {
                        character = NOV_denis_pushilin
                        ideology = hybrid_regime
                    }
                    set_country_leader_ideology = ultra_conservatism
                }
                NOV = {
                    annex_country = {
                        target = DPR
                        transfer_troops = yes
                    }
                    set_capital = {
                        state = 227
                        remember_old_capital = yes
                    }
                }
                227 = {
                    add_core_of = NOV
                }
                1374 = {
                    add_core_of = NOV
                }
                1091 = {
                    add_core_of = NOV
                }
                227 = {
                    remove_core_of = DPR
                }
                1374 = {
                    remove_core_of = DPR
                }
                1091 = {
                    remove_core_of = DPR
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_the_time_is_now }
                NOV = {
                    set_cosmetic_tag = NOV_zhir
                    set_party_name = {
                        ideology = fascist
                        long_name = NOV_fascist_ldpr_party
                        name = NOV_fascist_ldpr_party_short
                    }
                    promote_character = {
                        character = NOV_denis_pushilin_nationalist
                        ideology = classical_fascism
                    }
                    set_politics = {
                        ruling_party = fascist
                        elections_allowed = no
                    }
                }
                NOV = {
                    annex_country = {
                        target = DPR
                        transfer_troops = yes
                    }
                    set_capital = {
                        state = 227
                        remember_old_capital = yes
                    }
                }
                227 = {
                    add_core_of = NOV
                }
                1374 = {
                    add_core_of = NOV
                }
                1091 = {
                    add_core_of = NOV
                }
                227 = {
                    remove_core_of = DPR
                }
                1374 = {
                    remove_core_of = DPR
                }
                1091 = {
                    remove_core_of = DPR
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    desc = russia.487.d

                character = SOV_vladimir_putin
                ruling_only = yes
            }
        }
        NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_putin_ill_more_flag }
    }
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            country_event = { id = russia.488 days = 5 }
            set_portraits = {
                character = SOV_vladimir_putin
                civilian = { large ="GFX_portrait_SOV_vladimir_putin_post_assassination" }
            }
        }
    }
    option = { #a close call!
        name = russia.487.a
        set_country_flag = SOV_assassination_attempt_happened_flag
        add_stability = -0.1
        add_political_power = -100
        hidden_effect = {
            country_event = { id = russia.490 days = 8 }
        }
    }
}

#Another War Bond
country_event = {
    id = russia.497
    title = russia.497.t
    desc = russia.497.d
    picture = GFX_Rodina_party
    is_triggered_only = yes
    trigger = {
    }
    immediate = {

    }

    option = {
        name = russia.497.a
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = war_bond
            value = SOV.max_manpower_k
        }
        multiply_temp_variable = { war_bond = 0.3 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { war_bond = SOV.has_war_support }
        multiply_temp_variable = { war_bond = SOV.party_popularity@ruling_party }
        divide_temp_variable = { war_bond = 10000 }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = income_var_temp
            value = war_bond
        }
        add_income = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = war_bond_2
            value = war_bond
        }
        set_temp_variable_to_random = {
            var = random_temp_var
            min = 70
            max = 100
            integer = yes
        }
        multiply_temp_variable = { war_bond_2 = random_temp_var }
        round_temp_variable = war_bond_2
        add_cic = war_bond_2
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = war_bond_3
            value = war_bond
        }
        multiply_temp_variable = { war_bond_3 = 20 }
        round_temp_variable = war_bond_3
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_idea = SOV_ruble_for_fuhrer
            }
            modify_timed_idea = {
                idea = SOV_ruble_for_fuhrer
                days = war_bond_3
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_timed_idea = {
                idea = SOV_ruble_for_fuhrer
                days = war_bond_3
            }
        }
    }
}

#War charity
country_event = {
    id = russia.499
    title = russia.499.t
    desc = russia.499.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_war_charity
    is_triggered_only = yes
    trigger = {
    }
    immediate = {

    }

    option = {
        name = russia.499.a
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = support_var
            value = SOV.max_manpower_k
        }
        multiply_temp_variable = { support_var = SOV.has_war_support }
        multiply_temp_variable = { support_var = SOV.party_popularity@ruling_party }
        divide_temp_variable = { support_var = 450 }
        round_temp_variable = support_var
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = bpla_var
            value = support_var
        }
        set_temp_variable_to_random = {
            var = random_temp_var
            min = 0.3
            max = 0.6
        }
        multiply_temp_variable = { bpla_var = random_temp_var }
        round_temp_variable = bpla_var
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = support_equipment
            amount = support_var
            producer = SOV
        }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = guided_missile_equipment_1
            amount = bpla_var
            producer = SOV
        }
    }
}
#International ADS Help
country_event = {
    id = russia.500
    title = russia.500.t
    desc = russia.500.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_war_help
    is_triggered_only = yes
    trigger = {
    }
    immediate = {

    }

    option = {
        name = russia.500.a
        set_temp_variable = { rifles_var = random }
        set_temp_variable = { artillery_var = random }
        set_temp_variable = { btr_var = random }
        set_temp_variable = { bmp_var = random }
        set_temp_variable = { fuel_var = random }
        multiply_temp_variable = { rifles_var = SOV_ADS_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { artillery_var = SOV_ADS_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { btr_var = SOV_ADS_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { bmp_var = SOV_ADS_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { fuel_var = SOV_ADS_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { rifles_var = 70 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { fuel_var = 70 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { artillery_var = 7 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { btr_var = 7 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { bmp_var = 7 }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = infantry_equipment_1
            amount = rifles_var
        }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = spaa_equipment
            amount = artillery_var
        }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = mechanized_equipment
            amount = btr_var
        }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = light_mechanized_equipment
            amount = bmp_var
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                fuel_ratio > 0.5
            }
            add_fuel = fuel_var
        }
    }
}
#Statue of Putin

#Slovakian Thaw
country_event = {
    id = russia.503
    title = russia.503.t
    desc = russia.503.d
    picture = GFX_robert_fico

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.503.a
        SOV = {
            country_event = { id = russia.504 }
        }
        SLO = {
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = social_democrat
                elections_allowed = no
                last_election = "2026.12.17"
                election_frequency = 48
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = conservative
                popularity = 0.25
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_democrat
                popularity = 0.35
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                popularity = -0.45
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = -0.10
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_liberal
                popularity = 0.10
            }
            create_country_leader = {
                name = SLO_robert_fico_char
                picture = "gfx/Leaders/SLO/Robert Fico.png"
                ideology = social_democracy
            }
            set_party_name = { ideology = authoritarian_democrat long_name = SLO_authoritarian_democrat_party_long name = SLO_authoritarian_democrat_party }
        }
    }
}

                    ideology = hybrid_regime

                ideology = conservative
                popularity = 0.15
            }

                ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                popularity = 0.45
            }

                popularity = -0.50
            }

    }

            target = KKP
            type = annex_everything
        }
        declare_war_on = {
            target = GLC
            type = annex_everything
        }
        declare_war_on = {
            target = CHU
            type = annex_everything
        }
        every_possible_country = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    original_tag = KIR
                    original_tag = CKK
                    original_tag = KKP
                    original_tag = GLC
                    original_tag = CHU
                }
            }
            add_ideas = FLN_minor_siberian_war
        }
        add_ideas = FLN_siberian_war
        NAU = {
            country_event = { id = russia.514 days = 6 }
        }
    }
}

    desc = russia.514.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_olszanski

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = { #
        name = russia.514.a
        create_faction = SIB_COALITION
        hidden_effect = {
            remove_faction_goal = faction_goal_the_atomic_race
            add_faction_goal = faction_goal_placeholder_long_term
            remove_faction_goal = faction_goal_a_military_base
            add_faction_goal = faction_goal_placeholder_medium_term
            add_faction_goal = faction_goal_placeholder_short_term
        }
        NAU = {
            add_to_faction = KIR
            add_to_faction = CKK
            add_to_faction = GLC
            add_to_faction = CHU
            add_to_faction = KKP
            add_ideas = FLN_siberian_war
        }
        add_to_war = {
            targeted_alliance = CHU
            enemy = FLN
            hostility_reason = asked_to_join
        }
        FLN = {
            country_event = { id = russia.519 }
        }
    }
}

    desc = russia.515.d
