    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }

    option = { #
        name = russia.515.a
        create_country_leader = {
            name = SOV_andrey_kartapolov
            picture = "gfx/leaders/SOV/generals/Andrey_Kartapolov_Imperial.png"
            ideology = military_junta
        }
        set_politics = {
            ruling_party = nationalist
            last_election = "1922.5.12"
            election_frequency = 48
            elections_allowed = no
        }
        remove_ideas = NAU_poklonskaya_vs_military
        NAU = {
            country_event = { id = russia.516 days = 25 }
            drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
            set_cosmetic_tag = NAU_sib_state
        }
    }
    option = { #SHE SURVIVEDDDDD!!!! DDD;
        name = russia.515.b
        drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
        set_cosmetic_tag = NAU_sib_state
        remove_ideas = NAU_poklonskaya_vs_military
        add_ideas = NAU_poklonskaya_siberian_centralization
    }

    option = { #Putin returns form taiga
        name = russia.515.c
        create_country_leader = {
            name = SOV_vladimir_putin
            picture = "gfx/Leaders/Post_Russia/Putin_returned_form_taiga.png"
            ideology = ultranationalism
            traits = {
                hos_returned_from_taiga
            }
        }
        set_politics = {
            ruling_party = fascist
            last_election = "1922.5.12"
            election_frequency = 48
            elections_allowed = no
        }
        drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
        set_cosmetic_tag = NAU_rus_putin_state
        remove_ideas = NAU_poklonskaya_vs_military
        add_ideas = NAU_the_last_banquet
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = fascist
            long_name = NAU_putin_party
            name = NAU_putin_party
        }
        set_popularities = {
            fascist = 71
            authoritarian_democrat = 10
            nationalist = 4
            national_socialist = 15
        }
    }
}

    }

    }

        name = russia.544.a
        hidden_effect = {
            retire_ideology_leader = communist
            promote_character = {
                character = SOV_denis_parfenov
                ideology = marxism_leninism
            }
            set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:social_democrat }
            remove_from_coalition = yes
            set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:totalitarian_socialist }
            add_to_coalition = yes
            remove_ideas = SOV_rashkinism_idea
            remove_ideas = SOV_new_democratic_socialism_2
            remove_ideas = SOV_new_democratic_socialism
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = 0.1
        }
        set_politics = {
            ruling_party = communist
            elections_allowed = yes
            election_frequency = 48
        }
        set_country_flag = SOV_parfenov_coup
        add_ideas = SOV_partocracy2
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.544.b
        retire_ideology_leader = libertarian_socialist
        hidden_effect = {
            promote_character = {
                character = SOV_nikolay_bondarenko
                ideology = eurocommunism
            }
            remove_ideas = SOV_rashkinism_idea
            remove_ideas = SOV_new_democratic_socialism_2
            remove_ideas = SOV_new_democratic_socialism
        }
        set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:totalitarian_socialist }
        add_to_coalition = yes
        set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:communist }
        add_to_coalition = yes
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = libertarian_socialist
            popularity = 0.025
        }
        set_country_flag = SOV_bondarenko_coup
        add_ideas = SOV_rashkinism_idea_2
    }

#Choosing new marshal
country_event = {
    id = russia.546
    title = russia.546.t
    desc = russia.546.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_military_parade_generals

    is_triggered_only = yes

    trigger = {
    }

    immediate = {
    }

    option = { #Gerasimov
        name = russia.546.a
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    has_government = communist
                    has_government = libertarian_socialist
                }
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_valery_gerasimov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_marshal_of_soviet_union
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    has_government = fascist
                }
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_valery_gerasimov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_marshal_of_russia
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_valery_gerasimov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_marshal_of_russian_federation
            }
        }
    }
    option = { #Salyukov
        name = russia.546.b
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    has_government = communist
                    has_government = libertarian_socialist
                }
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_oleg_salyukov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_marshal_of_soviet_union
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    has_government = fascist
                }
            }
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_oleg_salyukov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_marshal_of_russia
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_trait = {
                character = SOV_oleg_salyukov
                slot = field_marshal
                trait = trait_SOV_marshal_of_russian_federation
            }
        }
    }
    option = { #Gulevich Union State
        name = russia.546.c
        trigger = {
            BLR = {
                exists = no
            }
            SOV = {
                has_government = authoritarian_democrat
            }
        }
        add_political_power = -25
        add_trait = {
            character = BLR_viktor_gulevich
            slot = field_marshal
            trait = trait_SOV_marshal_of_union_state
        }
    }
}

#elections of local representatives
country_event = {
    id = russia.552
    title = russia.552.t
    desc = russia.552.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_Moscow_1

    is_triggered_only = yes

    trigger = {
    }

    immediate = {
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.552.a
        every_controlled_state = {
            random_select_amount  = 5
            add_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_regional_rightist_administartion
            }
        }
        every_controlled_state = {
            limit = {
                NOT = {
                    has_dynamic_modifier = SOV_regional_rightist_administartion
                    has_dynamic_modifier = SOV_regional_liberal_administartion
                }
            }
            random_select_amount  = 5
            add_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_regional_leftist_administartion
            }
        }
        every_controlled_state = {
            limit = {
                NOT = {
                    has_dynamic_modifier = SOV_regional_rightist_administartion
                    has_dynamic_modifier = SOV_regional_leftist_administartion
                }
            }
            random_select_amount  = 2
            add_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_regional_liberal_administartion
            }
        }
    }
}

# Oligarch wants investment in their state - hidden dispatch event
country_event = {
    id = russia.623
    hidden = yes
    is_triggered_only = yes
    trigger = {
        tag = SOV
        NOT = {
            has_country_flag = SOV_nav_oligarch_subdued_flag
        }
    }

    immediate = {
        set_country_flag = SOV_oligarchs_investment
        if = {
            limit = { has_event_target = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state }
            clear_global_event_target = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state
        }
        random_list = {
            60 = {
                modifier = {
                    NOT = {
                        any_owned_state = {
                            is_core_of = ROOT
                            is_controlled_by = ROOT
                            free_building_slots = {
                                building = industrial_complex
                                size > 0
                                include_locked = no
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    factor = 0
                }
                random_owned_state = {
                    limit = {
                        is_core_of = ROOT
                        is_controlled_by = ROOT
                        free_building_slots = {
                            building = industrial_complex
                            size > 0
                            include_locked = no
                        }
                    }

                    save_global_event_target_as = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state
                    state_event = { id = russia.622 trigger_for = controller }
                }
            }
            40 = {
                modifier = {
                    NOT = {
                        any_owned_state = {
                            is_core_of = ROOT
                            is_controlled_by = ROOT
                            free_building_slots = {
                                building = arms_factory
                                size > 0
                                include_locked = no
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    factor = 0
                }
                modifier = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_build_up_western_military_district_UR
                    factor = 2
                }
                random_owned_state = {
                    limit = {
                        is_core_of = ROOT
                        is_controlled_by = ROOT
                        free_building_slots = {
                            building = arms_factory
                            size > 0
                            include_locked = no
                        }
                    }
                    save_global_event_target_as = SOV_oligarchs_investment_state
                    state_event = { id = russia.624 trigger_for = controller }
                }
            }
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            country_event = { id = russia.623 days = 365 random_days = 10 }
        }
    }
}

    id = russia.700

    }

        name = russia.700.a
        set_politics = {
            ruling_party = libertarian_socialist
            elections_allowed = yes
            election_frequency = 48
        }
        add_country_leader_role = {
            character = SOV_pavel_grudinin
            promote_leader = yes
            country_leader = {
                ideology = communist_populism
                expire = "1.1.1.1"
                id=-1
                traits = {
                }
            }
        }
        promote_character = SOV_pavel_grudinin
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = libertarian_socialist
            popularity = 0.25
        }
        set_country_flag = SOV_grudinin_coup
        remove_power_balance = {
            id = SOV_communist_party_balance
        }
        focus_unlock = yes
        complete_national_focus = SOV_leader_russia_needs
        hidden_effect = {
            set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:communist }
            add_to_coalition = yes
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = -0.1
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = conservative
                popularity = -0.05

    id = russia.729
    title = russia.729.t
    desc = russia.729.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_war_help
    is_triggered_only = yes
    trigger = {
    }
    immediate = {

    }

    option = {
        name = russia.729.a
        set_temp_variable = { rifles_var = random }
        set_temp_variable = { artillery_var = random }
        set_temp_variable = { btr_var = random }
        set_temp_variable = { bmp_var = random }
        set_temp_variable = { fuel_var = random }
        multiply_temp_variable = { rifles_var = SOV_brics_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { artillery_var = SOV_brics_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { btr_var = SOV_brics_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { bmp_var = SOV_brics_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { fuel_var = SOV_brics_number_of_members }
        multiply_temp_variable = { rifles_var = 70 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { fuel_var = 70 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { artillery_var = 7 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { btr_var = 7 }
        multiply_temp_variable = { bmp_var = 7 }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = infantry_equipment_1
            amount = rifles_var
        }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = spaa_equipment
            amount = artillery_var
        }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = mechanized_equipment
            amount = btr_var
        }
        add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
            type = light_mechanized_equipment
            amount = bmp_var
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                fuel_ratio > 0.5
            }
            add_fuel = fuel_var
        }
    }
}

            remove_ideas = SOV_neo_putinism
            remove_ideas = SOV_centralized_power

            remove_ideas = SOV_centralized_power2
            remove_ideas = SOV_russian_nationalism

            remove_power_balance = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
            }
            add_ideas = SOV_Nabiullina

            add_ideas = SOV_Dumin_sec

            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_improve_gerasimovs_doctrine
                }
                add_ideas = SOV_Leonid_Gornin
            }
            else_if = {

                    has_cosmetic_tag = MLD_zhir
                }
            }
            MLD = {
                set_cosmetic_tag = MLD_supreme_council_tag
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                ARM = {
                    has_cosmetic_tag = ARM_governorate_general
                }
            }
            ARM = {
                set_cosmetic_tag = ARM_supreme_council_tag
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                TMS = {
                    has_cosmetic_tag = ARM_governorate_general
                }
            }
            TMS = {
                set_cosmetic_tag = TMS_supreme_council_tag
            }
        }
    }

            add_ideas = SOV_MLD_russian_autonomy
        }
    }

    option = {
        name = russia.780.c #give them more freedom
        hidden_effect = {
            MLD = {
                every_controlled_state = {
                    add_resistance = -100
                    add_compliance = 100
                    force_disable_resistance = yes
                }
            }
        }
        add_political_power = 50
        add_war_support = -0.05
        MLD = {
            set_cosmetic_tag = MLD_zhir_free_poland
            remove_ideas = SOV_MLD_polish_rebel_movement2
        }
    }
}

#rise in anti-state activity inside of russia
country_event = {
    id = russia.800
    title = russia.800.t
    desc = {
        text = russia.800.d
        trigger = {
            NOT = { has_government = totalitarian_socialist }
        }
    }
    desc = {
        text = russia.800.d2
        trigger = {
            has_government = totalitarian_socialist
        }
    }
    picture = GFX_SOV_Assassination_Attempt

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #bad!
        name = russia.800.a
        add_stability = -0.035
        if = {
            limit = { has_government = totalitarian_socialist }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = totalitarian_socialist
                popularity = -0.05
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_government = nationalist
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = nationalist
                popularity = -0.05
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_government = authoritarian_democrat
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                popularity = -0.07
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = fascist
                popularity = -0.07
            }
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = libertarian_socialist
            popularity = 0.07
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_government = totalitarian_socialist
                }
                country_event = { id = russia.810 days = 15 }
            }
            else = {
                country_event = { id = russia.340 days = 15 }
            }
        }
    }
}

#Party Takeover
country_event = {
    id = russia.820
    title = russia.820.t
    desc = russia.820.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_debate_room

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    trigger = {
        NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_diminish_royal_authority }
    }
    option = { #MATveev succ
        name = russia.820.a
        add_stability = -0.1
        add_political_power = -35
        set_country_flag = SOV_burkov_overthrown_flag
        unlock_decision_tooltip = SOV_reform_the_party
        unlock_decision_tooltip = SOV_radicalize_the_party_progamme
        unlock_decision_tooltip = SOV_weaken_anti_communist_laws
        remove_mission = SOV_unstable_cabinet_burkov
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback_1
            }
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback_1
                add_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                has_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback
            }
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback
                add_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback_0
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                has_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback_0
            }
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback_0
                add_idea = SOV_anti_socialist_pushback_01
            }
        }
        custom_effect_tooltip = appoint_economic_minister_tooltip
        show_ideas_tooltip = SOV_Shchapov
        hidden_effect = {
            add_ideas = SOV_Shchapov
        }
    }
    option = { #Burkov wins
        name = russia.820.b
        add_stability = 0.03
        add_political_power = -50
    }
}

        name = russia.840.a
        add_political_power = -35
        FROM = {
            add_timed_idea = {
                idea = SOV_russian_civilian_investment_transnistria
                days = 150
            }
            every_controlled_state = {
                random_select_amount = 1
                add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
                add_building_construction = {
                    type = infrastructure
                    level = 1
                    instant_build = yes
                }
            }
            every_controlled_state = {
                random_select_amount = 1
                add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
                add_building_construction = {
                    type = office_park
                    level = 1
                    instant_build = yes
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = { #
        name = russia.840.b
        add_political_power = 10
    }
}

                idea = SOV_russian_support_2
                days = 110
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_template = "Russian-Trained Brigade"
                }
                random_owned_controlled_state = {
                    create_unit = {
                        division = "name = \"Russian-Trained Brigade\" division_template = \"Russian-Trained Brigade\" start_experience_factor = 0.1"
                        owner = FROM
                    }
                }
            }
            else = {
                division_template = {
                    name = "Russian-Trained Brigade"
                    is_locked = yes
                    division_cap = 3
                    priority = 0
                    template_counter = 0
                    regiments = {
                        motorized = { x = 0 y = 0 }
                        motorized = { x = 0 y = 1 }
                        motorized = { x = 0 y = 2 }
                        mechanized = { x = 1 y = 0 }
                        special_forces = { x = 1 y = 1 }
                        artillery_brigade = { x = 2 y = 0 }

                    }

                    support = {

                    }
                }
                random_owned_controlled_state = {
                    create_unit = {
                        division = "name = \"Russian-Trained Brigade\" division_template = \"Russian-Trained Brigade\" start_experience_factor = 0.1"
                        owner = FROM
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = { #
        name = russia.842.b
        add_political_power = 15
    }
}

    id = russia.844

    desc = russia.844.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_nadezhparty

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_nadezhdin_fight
                    }
                }
                country_event = {
                    id = russia.849
                    days = 4
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.844.a
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = market_liberal
            long_name = SOV_nadezhdin_cu_long
            name = SOV_nadezhdin_cu_short
        }
    }

        set_party_name = {
            ideology = market_liberal
            long_name = SOV_nadezhdin_acf_long
            name = SOV_nadezhdin_acf_short
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.844.c
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = market_liberal
            long_name = SOV_nadezhdin_hope_long
            name = SOV_nadezhdin_hope_short
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.844.e

            name = SOV_nadezhdin_right_short

    }
    option = {

            ideology = market_liberal

#unstable coalition onf
country_event = {
    id = russia.852
    title = russia.852.t
    desc = russia.852.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_duma_zloy

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.852.a
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
                        range = SOV_right_lean_onf
                    }
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
                        range = SOV_right_lean_2_onf
                    }
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
                value = -0.40
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
                        range = SOV_left_lean_onf
                    }
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
                        range = SOV_left_lean_2_onf
                    }
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
                value = 0.40
            }
        }
        add_timed_idea = {
            idea = SOV_coalition_disunity
            days = 75
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = society_development_var_temp
            value = -0.10
        }
        add_society_development = yes
    }
}

#transparent reform
country_event = {
    id = russia.854
    title = russia.854.t
    desc = russia.854.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_duma_zloy

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.854.a
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = {
                    has_dynamic_modifier = {
                        modifier = SOV_institutional_reforms
                    }
                }
            }
            hidden_effect = {
                add_dynamic_modifier = {
                    modifier = SOV_institutional_reforms
                }
            }
            effect_tooltip = {
                add_ideas = SOV_institutional_reform_transparent_right_idea
            }
            custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        }
        else = {
            effect_tooltip = {
                swap_ideas = {
                    remove_idea = SOV_institutional_reform_dummy
                    add_idea = SOV_institutional_reform_transparent_right_idea
                }
            }
            custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_institutional_reforms_expense_growth_factor_dynamic_var
                value = -0.05
            }
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_institutional_reforms_production_factory_max_efficiency_factor_dynamic_var
                value = 0.05
            }
        }
        add_power_balance_value = {
            id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
            value = 0.15
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = conservative
            popularity = 0.025
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.854.b
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = {
                    has_dynamic_modifier = SOV_institutional_reforms
                }
            }
            hidden_effect = {
                add_dynamic_modifier = {
                    modifier = SOV_institutional_reforms
                }
            }
            effect_tooltip = {
                add_ideas = SOV_institutional_reform_transparent_left_idea
            }
            custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        }
        else = {
            effect_tooltip = {
                swap_ideas = {
                    remove_idea = SOV_institutional_reform_dummy
                    add_idea = SOV_institutional_reform_transparent_left_idea
                }
            }
            custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_institutional_reforms_expense_growth_factor_dynamic_var
                value = -0.05
            }
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_institutional_reforms_production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor_dynamic_var
                value = 0.05
            }
        }
        add_power_balance_value = {
            id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
            value = -0.15
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = social_democrat
            popularity = 0.025
        }
    }
}

            custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_institutional_reforms_poverty_development_monthly_dynamic_var
                value = 0.01
            }
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_institutional_reforms_personal_expense_factor_dynamic_var
                value = 0.05
            }
        }
        add_power_balance_value = {
            id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
            value = -0.15
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = market_liberal
            popularity = 0.025
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = social_democrat
            popularity = 0.025
        }
    }

    title = russia.861.t
    desc = russia.861.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_duma_saint_george

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #Besedina
        name = russia.861.a
        trigger = {
            has_country_flag = SOV_chosen_besedina
        }
        set_country_flag = SOV_nadezhdin_heir
        remove_country_leader_role = {
            character = SOV_boris_nadezhdin
            ideology = centrist_pluralism
        }
        add_country_leader_role = {
            character = SOV_Darya_Besedina_char
            promote_leader = yes
            country_leader = {
                ideology = centrist_pluralism
                expire = "1.1.1.1"
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_idea = SOV_Darya_Besedina_better
            }
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_Darya_Besedina_better
                add_idea = SOV_Maksim_Katz_hog2
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                has_idea = SOV_Darya_Besedina
            }
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_Darya_Besedina
                add_idea = SOV_Maksim_Katz_hog2
            }
        }
        swap_ideas = {
            remove_idea = SOV_Maksim_Katz2
            add_idea = SOV_Dmitry_Kisiev_interior
        }
    }
    option = { #Kisiev

            has_country_flag = SOV_chosen_kisiev
        }
        set_country_flag = SOV_nadezhdin_heir

                expire = "1.1.1.1"
            }

                remove_idea = SOV_Dmitry_Kisiev_better

            }

            }

country_event = {

    title = russia.874.t
    desc = russia.874.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_war_torn_city

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            every_owned_state = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        state = 808
                        state = 94
                        state = 194
                        state = 206
                        state = 204
                        state = 741
                        state = 840
                        state = 1329
                        state = 1182
                    }
                }
                add_dynamic_modifier = {
                    modifier = SOV_devastated_by_war
                }
            }
            every_state = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = { is_owned_by = UKR }
                    OR = {
                        is_core_of = NOV
                        state = 857
                    }
                }
                add_dynamic_modifier = {
                    modifier = SOV_devastated_by_war
                }
            }
            every_state = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        state = 1059
                        state = 137
                    }
                }
                add_dynamic_modifier = {
                    modifier = SOV_devastated_by_war
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.874.a
        effect_tooltip = {
            every_owned_state = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        state = 808
                        state = 94
                        state = 194
                        state = 206
                        state = 204
                        state = 741
                        state = 840
                        state = 1329
                        state = 1182
                    }
                }
                add_dynamic_modifier = {
                    modifier = SOV_devastated_by_war
                }
            }
            every_state = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = { is_owned_by = UKR }
                    OR = {
                        is_core_of = NOV
                        state = 857
                    }
                }
                add_dynamic_modifier = {
                    modifier = SOV_devastated_by_war
                }
            }
            every_owned_state = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        state = 1059
                        state = 137
                    }
                }
                add_dynamic_modifier = {
                    modifier = SOV_devastated_by_war
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

#Rokirovka
country_event = {
    id = russia.885
    title = russia.885.t
    desc = russia.885.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_duma_saint_george

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #
        name = russia.885.a
        add_political_power = -100
        set_country_flag = SOV_medvedev_surkov_successor_flag
        set_country_flag = SOV_ur_economy_enabled
        set_country_flag = SOV_diplomacy_enabled
        mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
        complete_national_focus = SOV_history_continues_surkov
        add_country_leader_role = {
            character = SOV_vladislav_surkov
            promote_leader = yes
            country_leader = {
                ideology = putinism_despot
                expire = "1.1.1.1"
                traits = {
                    sec_long_lasting_state_ideologue
                }
            }
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = nationalist
            popularity = 0.075
        }
        focus_unlock = yes
        hidden_effect = {
            add_ideas = SOV_Kurenkov
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = nationalist
                elections_allowed = no
            }
            set_party_name = {
                ideology = nationalist
                long_name = SOV_surkov_apf_despotic_long
                name = SOV_surkov_apf_despotic_short
            }
            set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:authoritarian_democrat }
            add_to_coalition = yes
            news_event = { id = news.580 hours = 8 }
        }
    }
}

#Formation of SSSR
country_event = {
    id = russia.914
    title = russia.914.t
    desc = russia.914.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_good_old_days

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.914.a
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_united_with_CPRF
            }
            set_party_name = {
                ideology = communist
                long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_sovietists_long
                name = SOV_medvedev_apf_sovietists_short
            }
            set_party_name = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_sovietists_long
                name = SOV_medvedev_apf_sovietists_short
            }
        }
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = social_democrat
            long_name = SOV_medvedev_apf_sovietists_long
            name = SOV_medvedev_apf_sovietists_short
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_united_with_CPRF
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.02
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.025
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_democrat
                popularity = 0.025
            }
        }
        custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        SOV_switch_slp_with_soviet = yes
    }
}

#Russia Ending
country_event = {
    id = russia.1000
    title = {
        text = russia.1000.t1
        trigger = {
            has_global_flag = SOV_cprf_won
        }
    }
    desc = {
        text = russia.1000.d1
        trigger = {
            has_global_flag = SOV_cprf_won
        }
    }
    title = {
        text = russia.1000.t2
        trigger = {
            OR = {
                has_global_flag = SOV_ldpr_won
            }
        }
    }
    desc = {
        text = russia.1000.d2
        trigger = {
            OR = {
                has_global_flag = SOV_ldpr_won
            }
        }
    }
    title = {
        text = russia.1000.t3
        trigger = {
            has_global_flag = SOV_medvedev_won
            NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_national_russia_victory }
        }
    }
    title = {
        text = russia.1000.t.Alikhanov
        trigger = {
            has_global_flag = SOV_medvedev_won

                    name = EST_communist_party_real
                    long_name = EST_communist_party_real_long
                }
                add_popularity = {
                    ideology = libertarian_socialist
                    popularity = -0.90
                }
                add_popularity = {
                    ideology = communist
                    popularity = 0.35
                }
                add_popularity = {
                    ideology = libertarian_socialist
                    popularity = 0.05
                }
                set_politics= {
                    ruling_party = communist
                    elections_allowed = no
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1500.a
        effect_tooltip = {
            EST = {
                set_party_name = {
                    ideology = communist
                    name = EST_communist_party_real
                    long_name = EST_communist_party_real_long
                }
                set_politics= {

    desc = russia.1501.d

    immediate = {
        hidden_effect = {
            if = {
                limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_afonin_selected_flag  }
                set_power_balance = {
                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                    set_value = -0.05
                }
            }
            else_if = {
                limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_levchenko_selected_flag }
                set_power_balance = {
                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                    set_value = 0.05
                }
            }
            else = {
                set_power_balance = {
                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                    set_value = 0.00
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1501.a
        effect_tooltip = {
            if = {
                limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_afonin_selected_flag  }
                set_power_balance = {
                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                    set_value = -0.05
                }
            }
            else_if = {
                limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_levchenko_selected_flag }

                    set_value = 0.05
                }
            }
            else = {

                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance

                }
            }
        }
    }
}

country_event = {
    id = russia.1502
    title = russia.1502.t
    desc = russia.1502.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_soviet_election

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1502.a
        if = {
            limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_afonin_selected_flag }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.075
            }
            set_power_balance = {
                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                set_value = -0.075
            }
            SOV_add_start_party_unity = yes
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_levchenko_selected_flag }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.075
            }
            set_power_balance = {
                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                set_value = 0.075
            }
            add_political_power = 50
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_grudinin_selected_flag }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.075
            }
            SOV_add_election_result = yes
        }
        else = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = 0.075
            }
            add_stability = 0.075
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1502.b
        set_country_flag = SOV_campaign_socialist
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_add_opinion_socialist_tt
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = 0.05
        }
        SOV_add_start_party_unity = yes
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1502.c
        set_country_flag = SOV_campaign_democrat
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_add_opinion_democrat_tt
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = 0.05
        }

    }

    id = russia.1508
    title = russia.1508.t
    desc = russia.1508.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_russia_map

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1508.a
        add_political_power = -75
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = 0.025
        }
        every_owned_state = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    has_dynamic_modifier = {
                        modifier = SOV_republic_of_tatarstan
                    }
                    has_dynamic_modifier = {
                        modifier = SOV_chechen_republic
                    }
                }
            }
            hidden_effect = {
                remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_republic_of_tatarstan }
                remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_chechen_republic }
            }
            add_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_ass_republic
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1508.b
        every_owned_state = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    has_dynamic_modifier = {
                        modifier = SOV_republic_of_tatarstan
                    }
                    has_dynamic_modifier = {
                        modifier = SOV_chechen_republic
                    }
                }
            }
            hidden_effect = {
                remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_republic_of_tatarstan }
                remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_chechen_republic }
            }
            add_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_ass_republic_special
            }
        }
        unlock_decision_tooltip = SOV_restore_order_in_assrepublics
        set_country_flag = SOV_assrepublics_2_flag
    }
}

#Кадровая коммиссия ивент
country_event = {
    id = russia.1510
    title = russia.1510.t
    desc = russia.1510.d
    picture = GFX_CPRF_congress
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1510.a
        set_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_auto_flag
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_cprf_congress_auto_tt
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1510.b
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_cprf_congress_manual_tt
        hidden_effect = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        AND = {
                            is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                range < SOV_middle
                            }
                            check_variable = {
                                SOV_party_unity < 40
                            }
                        }
                        AND = {
                            is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                range < SOV_old_guard_power_range
                            }
                            check_variable = {
                                SOV_party_unity < 65
                            }
                            check_variable = {
                                var = SOV_party_unity
                                value = 40
                                compare = greater_than_or_equals
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                country_event = { id = russia.1512 }
            }
            else_if = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        AND = {
                            is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                range > SOV_middle
                            }
                            check_variable = {
                                SOV_party_unity < 40
                            }
                        }
                        AND = {
                            is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                range > SOV_new_guard_power_range
                            }
                            check_variable = {
                                SOV_party_unity < 65
                            }
                            check_variable = {
                                var = SOV_party_unity
                                value = 40
                                compare = greater_than_or_equals
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                country_event = { id = russia.1513 }
            }
            else = {
                country_event = { id = russia.1511 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #Afonin
        name = russia.1514.a
        trigger = {
            NOT = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_afonin_flag
            }
        }
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_cprf_second_secretary_tt
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_leader = {
                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                    ruling_only = yes
                }
            }
            show_ideas_tooltip = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_president_party
        }
        else = {
            show_ideas_tooltip = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_party
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            country_event = { id = russia.1515 }
        }
    }
    option = { #Melnikov
        name = russia.1514.b
        set_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_second_secretary_melnikov_flag
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_cprf_second_secretary_tt
        show_ideas_tooltip = SOV_Ivan_Melnikov_party
        hidden_effect = {

        }
    }
    option = { #Levchenko
        name = russia.1514.c
        set_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_second_secretary_levchenko_flag
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_cprf_second_secretary_tt

                    character = SOV_sergey_levchenko

#Congress event
country_event = {
    id = russia.1519
    title = russia.1519.t
    desc = russia.1519.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_CPRF_2
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1519.a
        add_political_power = 100
        add_command_power = 10
        add_stability = 0.075
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_resource_var_temp
            value = 25
        }
        SOV_add_party_resource = yes
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_auto_flag
            }
            set_temp_variable = {
                var = SOV_party_unity_temp
                value = 10
            }
            SOV_add_party_unity = yes
        }
        else = {
            set_temp_variable = {
                var = SOV_party_unity_temp
                value = 5
            }
            SOV_add_party_unity = yes
        }
        focus_unlock = yes
        hidden_effect = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_auto_flag
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range < SOV_middle
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 40
                                }
                            }
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range < SOV_old_guard_power_range
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 65
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    var = SOV_party_unity
                                    value = 40
                                    compare = greater_than_or_equals
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    set_country_flag = SOV_afonin_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_zyuganov_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
                    set_country_flag = SOV_congress_afonin_elected
                    if = {
                        limit = {
                            NOT = {
                                has_country_leader = {
                                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                                    ruling_only = yes
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        swap_ideas = {
                            remove_idea = SOV_Gennady_Zyuganov_leader
                            add_idea = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_leader
                        }
                    }
                    else = {
                        remove_ideas = SOV_Gennady_Zyuganov_leader
                    }
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range > SOV_middle
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 40
                                }
                            }
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range > SOV_new_guard_power_range
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 65
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    var = SOV_party_unity
                                    value = 40
                                    compare = greater_than_or_equals
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    set_country_flag = SOV_rashkin_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_zyuganov_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
                    set_country_flag = SOV_congress_rashkin_elected
                    swap_ideas = {
                        remove_idea = SOV_Gennady_Zyuganov_leader
                        add_idea = SOV_Valery_Rashkin_leader
                    }
                }
                else = {
                    #зюганов остаётся короче
                    set_country_flag = SOV_congress_zyuganov_elected
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range < SOV_middle
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 40
                                }
                            }
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range < SOV_old_guard_power_range
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 65
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    var = SOV_party_unity
                                    value = 40
                                    compare = greater_than_or_equals
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_party
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_president_party
                    add_ideas = SOV_Ivan_Melnikov_party
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range > SOV_middle
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 40
                                }
                            }
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range > SOV_new_guard_power_range
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 65
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    var = SOV_party_unity
                                    value = 40
                                    compare = greater_than_or_equals
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_party
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_president_party
                    if = {
                        limit = {
                            has_country_leader = {
                                character = SOV_sergey_levchenko
                                ruling_only = yes
                            }
                        }
                        add_ideas = SOV_Sergey_Levchenko_president_party
                    }
                    else = {
                        add_ideas = SOV_Sergey_Levchenko_party
                    }
                }
                else = {
                    #афонин остаётся короче
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        check_variable = {
                            SOV_party_unity < 55
                        }
                    }
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Nikolay_Ivanov_party
                    add_ideas = SOV_Yaroslav_Listov_party
                }
                else = {
                    #иванов остаётся короче
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        is_power_balance_in_range = {
                            id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                            range > SOV_new_guard_dominant_range
                        }
                        check_variable = {
                            SOV_party_unity < 50
                        }
                    }
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Vladimir_Isakov_party
                    add_ideas = SOV_Daria_Bagina_party
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range > SOV_middle
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 40
                                }
                            }
                            AND = {
                                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                                    id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                                    range > SOV_new_guard_power_range
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    SOV_party_unity < 65
                                }
                                check_variable = {
                                    var = SOV_party_unity
                                    value = 40
                                    compare = greater_than_or_equals
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Vladimir_Isakov_party
                    add_ideas = SOV_Mikhail_Kremlyov_party
                }
                else = {
                    #исаков остаётся короче
                }
            }
            else = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_afonin_flag
                    }
                    set_country_flag = SOV_afonin_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_zyuganov_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_afonin_flag
                    set_country_flag = SOV_congress_afonin_elected
                    if = {
                        limit = {
                            NOT = {
                                has_country_leader = {
                                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                                    ruling_only = yes
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        swap_ideas = {
                            remove_idea = SOV_Gennady_Zyuganov_leader
                            add_idea = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_leader
                        }
                    }
                    else = {
                        remove_ideas = SOV_Gennady_Zyuganov_leader
                    }
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_rashkin_flag
                    }
                    set_country_flag = SOV_rashkin_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_zyuganov_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_rashkin_flag
                    set_country_flag = SOV_congress_rashkin_elected
                    swap_ideas = {
                        remove_idea = SOV_Gennady_Zyuganov_leader
                        add_idea = SOV_Valery_Rashkin_leader
                    }
                }
                else = {
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_zyuganov_flag
                    #ничё не происходит
                    set_country_flag = SOV_congress_zyuganov_elected
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_second_secretary_melnikov_flag
                    }
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_second_secretary_melnikov_flag
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_party
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_president_party
                    add_ideas = SOV_Ivan_Melnikov_party
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_second_secretary_levchenko_flag
                    }
                    clr_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_second_secretary_levchenko_flag
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_party
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_president_party
                    if = {
                        limit = {
                            has_country_leader = {
                                character = SOV_sergey_levchenko
                                ruling_only = yes
                            }
                        }
                        add_ideas = SOV_Sergey_Levchenko_president_party
                    }
                    else = {
                        add_ideas = SOV_Sergey_Levchenko_party
                    }
                }
                else = {
                    #афонин остаётся
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_ccac_secretary_listov_flag
                    }
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Nikolay_Ivanov_party
                    add_ideas = SOV_Yaroslav_Listov_party
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_congress_komsomol_secretary_kremlyov_flag
                    }
                    remove_ideas = SOV_Vladimir_Isakov_party
                    add_ideas = SOV_Mikhail_Kremlyov_party
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

#labor shortage
country_event = {
    id = russia.1520
    title = russia.1520.t
    desc = russia.1520.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_labor_shortage
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1520.a
        add_political_power = -50
        add_timed_idea = {
            idea = SOV_economic_incentives_idea
            days = 125
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = poverty_development_var_temp
            value = 0.1
        }
        add_poverty_development = yes
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = 0.05
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        SOV_add_adl_progress_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_labor_fatherland_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        SOV_add_labor_fatherland_influence = yes
        SOV_update_party_legitimacy = yes
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1520.b
        add_political_power = -100
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_resource_var_temp
            value = 40
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_resource_var_compare_temp
            value = SOV_party_resource_var
        }
        subtract_from_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_resource_var_compare_temp
            value = SOV_party_resource_var_temp
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { SOV_party_resource_var_compare_temp < 0 }
            }
            add_to_temp_variable = {
                var = SOV_party_resource_var_temp
                value = SOV_party_resource_var_compare_temp
            }
        }
        multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_party_resource_var_temp = -1 }
        SOV_add_party_resource = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_unity_temp
            value = -7.5
        }
        add_to_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_unity_temp
            value = SOV_party_resource_var_compare_temp
        }
        SOV_add_party_unity = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_legitimacy_temp
            value = -7.5
        }
        SOV_add_party_legitimacy = yes
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1520.c
        remove_ideas = SOV_reindustrialization_campaign_idea_2
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_peoples_front_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        SOV_add_peoples_front_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_ldpr_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        SOV_add_ldpr_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_patriots_party_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        SOV_add_patriots_party_influence = yes
        SOV_update_party_legitimacy = yes
    }
}

#small business thing
country_event = {
    id = russia.1521
    title = russia.1521.t
    desc = russia.1521.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_market_socialism_event
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1521.a
        add_timed_idea = {
            idea = SOV_new_economic_policy
            days = 250
        }
        custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        effect_tooltip = {
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_cp_rsfsr_idea_blank
                add_idea = SOV_cp_rsfsr_idea_small_business
            }
            custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_communist_party_upgrade
            custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_communist_party_personal_value_factor_var
            value = 0.025
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_legitimacy_temp
            value = 2.5
        }
        SOV_add_party_legitimacy = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = poverty_development_var_temp
            value = 0.15
        }
        add_poverty_development = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        SOV_add_adl_progress_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_labor_fatherland_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_peoples_front_influence_var_temp
            value = -0.05
        }
        SOV_add_peoples_front_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_ldpr_influence_var_temp
            value = -0.05
        }
        SOV_add_ldpr_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_patriots_party_influence_var_temp
            value = -0.05
        }
        SOV_add_labor_fatherland_influence = yes
        SOV_update_party_legitimacy = yes
        SOV_add_planners_small = yes
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1521.b
        effect_tooltip = {
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_dummy
                add_idea = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_small_business_support_2
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor_dynamic
            value = 0.05
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_production_factory_max_efficiency_factor_dynamic
            value = 0.05
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_income_growth_factor_dynamic
            value = 0.015
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_production_speed_arms_factory_factor_dynamic
            value = 0.05
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_production_speed_industrial_complex_factor_dynamic
            value = 0.025
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_production_speed_office_park_factor_dynamic
            value = 0.025
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_business_value_factor_dynamic
            value = 0.025
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_personal_value_factor_dynamic
            value = -0.05
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_industrial_development_monthly_dynamic
            value = 0.005
        }
        add_to_variable = {
            var = SOV_socialism_of_21_century_farming_development_monthly_dynamic
            value = 0.005
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = poverty_development_var_temp
            value = -0.075
        }
        add_poverty_development = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = industrial_development_var_temp
            value = 0.15
        }
        add_industrial_development = yes
        add_to_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_unity_temp
            value = -5
        }
        SOV_add_party_unity = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_legitimacy_temp
            value = -7.5
        }
        SOV_add_party_legitimacy = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_oligarch_approval_rating_var_temp
            value = 0.075
        }
        SOV_add_oligarch_approval_rating = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_peoples_front_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.05
        }
        SOV_add_peoples_front_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_ldpr_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.025
        }
        SOV_add_ldpr_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {

            value = 0.025
        }

#stalin cult типа?
country_event = {
    id = russia.1523
    title = russia.1523.t
    desc = russia.1523.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_kagarlitsky
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1523.a
        effect_tooltip = {
            swap_ideas = {
                remove_idea = SOV_cp_rsfsr_idea_blank
                add_idea = SOV_cp_rsfsr_idea_glorify_stalin_2
            }
            custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_communist_party_upgrade
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_communist_party_army_attack_factor_var
                value = -0.095
            }
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_communist_party_army_defence_factor_var
                value = -0.095
            }
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_communist_party_political_power_gain_var
                value = 0.02
            }
            add_to_variable = {
                var = SOV_communist_party_stability_factor_var
                value = 0.125
            }

            SOV_update_party_legitimacy = yes
        }
    }
}

#АДЛ Прогресс договориться
country_event = {
    id = russia.1524
    title = russia.1524.t
    desc = russia.1524.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_ADL_Progress
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1524.a
        SOV_add_adl_progress_opinion = yes
        custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = social_democrat
            popularity = 0.025
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_temp
            value = 0.45
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_compare_temp
            value = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var
        }
        subtract_from_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_compare_temp
            value = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_temp
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_compare_temp < 0 }
            }
            add_to_temp_variable = {
                var = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_temp
                value = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_compare_temp
            }
            multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_compare_temp = 250 }
            add_political_power = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_compare_temp
        }
        multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_temp = -1 }
        SOV_add_adl_progress_influence = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_unity_temp
            value = -2.5
        }
        SOV_add_party_unity = yes
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1524.b
        add_political_power = 5
    }
}

#АДЛ Прогресс - победил Шеин
country_event = {
    id = russia.1529
    title = russia.1529.t
    desc = russia.1529.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_oleg_shein
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1529.a
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    AND = {
                        set_temp_variable = {
                            var = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_trigger_temp
                            value = 0.8
                        }
                        SOV_has_adl_progress_influence_greater_than_or_equals = yes
                    }
                    NOT = {
                        is_in_array = {
                            array = SOV_other_parties
                            value = ARG.id #Peoples Front
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            add_political_power = 15
        }
        else = {
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = social_liberal
                popularity = 0.05
            }
            set_temp_variable = {
                var = SOV_peoples_front_influence_var_temp
                value = -0.075
            }
            SOV_add_peoples_front_influence = yes
            add_political_power = -15
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = social_democrat
            popularity = 0.015
        }
        promote_character = {
            character = SOV_oleg_shein
            ideology = reformist_socialism_socdem
        }
        set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var_temp = token:social_democrat }
        add_to_coalition = yes
        set_country_flag = SOV_adl_progress_shein_flag
        hidden_effect = {
            set_variable = {
                var = SOV_adl_progress_opinion_var
                value = 5
            }
        }
    }
}
