#АДЛ Прогресс - съезд начало + Донбасс меняется + Профсоюзы бунтуют
country_event = {
    id = russia.1532
    title = russia.1532.t
    desc = russia.1532.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_alexey_sakhnin
    is_triggered_only = yes
    hidden = yes
    immediate = {
        activate_mission = SOV_adl_progress_congress
        DPR = {
            remove_ideas = NOV_political_blur_idea
            promote_character = {
                character = DPR_denis_pushilin
                ideology = market_socialism
            }
            set_temp_variable = { NOV_ideology_temp = party_popularity@authoritarian_democrat }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = NOV_ideology_temp
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = authoritarian_democrat
                popularity = -100
            }
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = communist
                elections_allowed = no
            }
        }
        NOV = {
            remove_ideas = NOV_political_blur_idea
            add_country_leader_role = {
                character = NOV_leonid_paschenik
                promote_leader = yes
                country_leader = {
                    ideology = patriotic_socialism
                    expire = "1.1.1.1"
                }
            }
        }
        random_list = {
            99 = {
                modifier = {
                    factor = 0
                    NOT = {
                        is_in_array = {
                            array = SOV_other_parties
                            value = BOL.id #ADL Progress
                        }
                    }
                }
                country_event = {
                    id = russia.1550
                    days = 350
                    random_days = 75
                }
            }
            1 = {
                modifier = {
                    factor = 0
                    NOT = {
                        is_in_array = {
                            array = SOV_other_parties
                            value = ARG.id #Peoples Front
                        }
                    }
                }
                country_event = {
                    id = russia.1551
                    days = 350
                    random_days = 75
                }
            }
            0 = {
                modifier = {
                    add = 100
                    NOT = {
                        is_in_array = {
                            array = SOV_other_parties
                            value = BOL.id #ADL Progress
                        }
                        is_in_array = {
                            array = SOV_other_parties
                            value = ARG.id #Peoples Front
                        }
                    }
                }
                #nothing, может чё-то потом тут придумаю
            }
        }
    }
}

country_event = {
    id = russia.1533
    title = russia.1533.t
    desc = russia.1533.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_cprf_local_leader
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1533.a
        add_political_power = 30
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = 0.01
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_unity_temp
            value = -5
        }
        SOV_add_party_unity = yes
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_resource_var_temp
            value = 2.5
        }
        SOV_add_party_resource = yes
        custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_local_leader_flag
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                value = 0.05
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                value = -0.05
            }
        }
        SOV_update_party_legitimacy = yes
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1533.b
        add_political_power = -25
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = libertarian_socialist
            popularity = 0.01
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            var = SOV_party_unity_temp
            value = -5
        }
        SOV_add_party_unity = yes
        custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_cprf_local_leader_flag
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                value = -0.05
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                value = 0.05
            }
        }
        custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
        event_target:SOV_cprf_local_leader_state = {
            add_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_renewed_leadership_modifier
                days = 180
            }
        }
        SOV_update_party_legitimacy = yes
    }
}
country_event = {
    id = russia.1534
    title = russia.1534.t
    desc = russia.1534.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_cprf_local_leader
    is_triggered_only = yes
    hidden = yes
    trigger = {
        has_country_flag = SOV_communist_party_rule
    }
    immediate = {
        if = {
            limit = { has_event_target = SOV_cprf_local_leader_state }
            clear_global_event_target = SOV_cprf_local_leader_state
            clr_country_flag = SOV_cprf_local_leader_flag
        }
        random_list = {
            # seed = random # Откуда вы вообще взяли строчку seed? ~Wood
            60 = {
                #nothing
            }
            40 = {
                set_country_flag = SOV_cprf_local_leader_flag
            }
        }
        random_owned_state = {
            limit = {
                is_core_of = ROOT
                is_controlled_by = ROOT
                state_population_k > 300
                NOT = {
                    OR = {
                        state = 195
                        state = 1339
                        state = 1059
                        state = 705
                        has_dynamic_modifier = {
                            modifier = SOV_ass_republic_special
                        }
                        has_dynamic_modifier = {
                            modifier = SOV_ass_republic
                        }
                        has_dynamic_modifier = {
                            modifier = SOV_renewed_leadership_modifier
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            save_global_event_target_as = SOV_cprf_local_leader_state
            state_event = { id = russia.1533 trigger_for = controller }
        }
        country_event = {
            id = russia.1534
            days = 300
            random_days = 100
        }
    }
}

                            modifier = SOV_ass_republic
                        }
                        has_dynamic_modifier = {
                            modifier = SOV_renewed_leadership_modifier
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            save_global_event_target_as = SOV_cprf_local_problem_state
            state_event = { id = russia.1535 trigger_for = controller }
        }
        country_event = {
            id = russia.1536
            days = 500
            random_days = 100
        }
    }
}

    desc = russia.1547.d

    }

        name = russia.1547.a
        trigger = {
            check_variable = { SOV_soviet_economic_school_var < 0 }
        }
        custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_pragmatic_approach_tt
        hidden_effect = {
            set_country_flag = SOV_renewed_program_flag_1
            add_country_leader_role = {
                character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
                country_leader = {
                    ideology = market_socialism
                    traits = { hos_the_red_eagle }
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_country_flag = SOV_abolish_post_of_president_flag
                }
                promote_character = {
                    character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
                    ideology = market_socialism
                }
            }
            else = {
                if = {
                    limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_afonin_selected_flag }
                    add_country_leader_role = {
                        character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                        promote_leader = yes
                        country_leader = {
                            ideology = market_socialism
                            traits = { hos_initiative_apparatchik hos_powerless_president }
                        }
                    }
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_levchenko_selected_flag }

                        character = SOV_sergey_levchenko
                        promote_leader = yes
                        country_leader = {
                            ideology = market_socialism
                            traits = { hos_red_president hos_powerless_president }
                        }
                    }

                        promote_leader = yes

                }

                }

                    }
                }
                DATA = "[SOV_election_date_loc]"
            }
            set_temp_variable = { ruling_party_wing_var_temp = token:communist }
            add_ruling_party_wing = yes
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = communist
                popularity = -0.25
            }
            add_popularity = {
                ideology = libertarian_socialist
                popularity = 0.25
            }
        }
    }
}

            value = -2.5
        }

        hidden_effect = {
            country_event = {
                id = russia.246
                days = 16
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = russia.1553.a
        trigger = {
            OR = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_congress_afonin_elected
                AND = {
                    has_country_flag = SOV_congress_zyuganov_elected
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_communist_party_balance
                        range < SOV_new_guard_influence_range
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        set_country_flag = SOV_congress_2_afonin_elected

            SOV_yuri_afonin = {
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = market_socialism
                }
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = left_nationalism
                }
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = marxism_leninism
                }
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = communist_populism
                }
                remove_country_leader_role = {
                    ideology = post_leftism
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    OR = {
                        has_country_flag = SOV_renewed_program_flag_1
                        has_completed_focus = SOV_pragmatic_approach
                    }
                }

                    character = SOV_yuri_afonin
                    promote_leader = yes

                        ideology = market_socialism
                        traits = { hos_initiative_apparatchik }
                    }
                }
            }

                limit = {

country_event = {
    id = russia.1554
    title = russia.1554.t
    desc = russia.1554.d
    picture = GFX_APLA_Congress

    is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = russia.1554.a
        set_country_flag = SOV_open_econ_tree
        set_country_flag = SOV_open_diplo_tree
        clr_country_flag = SOV_supreme_soviet_disabled
        meta_effect = {
            text = {
                set_variable = {
                    var = SOV_election_date_year
                    value = [YEAR]
                }
                set_variable = {
                    var = SOV_election_date_year_2
                    value = [YEAR]
                }
                add_to_variable = {
                    var = SOV_election_date_year_2
                    value = -1
                }
                set_variable = {
                    var = SOV_election_date_year_3
                    value = [YEAR]
                }
                add_to_variable = {
                    var = SOV_election_date_year_3
                    value = 1
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR2].12.31
                        date < [YEAR].02.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 1
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].01.31
                        date < [YEAR].03.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 2
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].02.28
                        date < [YEAR].04.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 3
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].03.31
                        date < [YEAR].05.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 4
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].04.30
                        date < [YEAR].06.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 5
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].05.31
                        date < [YEAR].07.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 6
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].06.30
                        date < [YEAR].08.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 7
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].07.31
                        date < [YEAR].09.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 8
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].8.31
                        date < [YEAR].10.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 9
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].9.30
                        date < [YEAR].11.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 10
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].10.31
                        date < [YEAR].12.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 11
                    }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        date > [YEAR].11.31
                        date < [YEAR3].1.1
                    }
                    set_variable = {
                        var = SOV_election_date_month
                        value = 12
                    }
                }
            }
            YEAR = "[GetYear]"
            YEAR2 = "[?SOV_election_date_year_2|.0]"
            YEAR3 = "[?SOV_election_date_year_3|.0]"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_symbol_of_change
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_new_public_dialogue
                    has_country_flag = SOV_renewed_program_flag_3
                }
            }
            meta_effect = {
                text = {
                    set_politics = {
                        ruling_party = libertarian_socialist
                        elections_allowed = yes
                        election_frequency = 48
                        last_election = [DATA]
                    }
                }
                DATA = "[SOV_election_date_loc]"
            }
        }
        else = {
            meta_effect = {
                text = {
                    set_politics = {
                        ruling_party = communist
                        elections_allowed = yes
                        election_frequency = 48
                        last_election = [DATA]
                    }
                }
                DATA = "[SOV_election_date_loc]"
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = {
                    has_country_flag = SOV_abolish_post_of_president_flag
                }
            }
            set_country_flag = head_of_gov_ui_enabled
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_congress_2_afonin_elected
            }
            set_country_flag = SOV_afonin_elected
            set_country_flag = SOV_party_line_afon1
            complete_national_focus = SOV_successor
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_congress_2_levchenko_elected
            }
            set_country_flag = SOV_afonin_elected
            set_country_flag = SOV_party_line_afon2
            complete_national_focus = SOV_successor
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_congress_2_lukashenko_elected
            }
            set_country_flag = SOV_lukashenko_elected
            complete_national_focus = SOV_new_lukashenko_era
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_congress_2_rashkin_elected
            }
            set_country_flag = SOV_rashkin_elected
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_back_to_revolutionary_roots
                }
                set_country_flag = SOV_rashkin_second_in_command_parfenov
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_pragmatic_approach
                }
                set_country_flag = SOV_rashkin_second_in_command_levchenko
            }
            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_completed_focus = SOV_reinvent_democracy
                }
                set_country_flag = SOV_rashkin_second_in_command_kagarlitsky
            }
            complete_national_focus = SOV_rashkins_triumph
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_flag = SOV_congress_2_pasechnik_elected
            }
            set_country_flag = SOV_pasechnik_elected
            complete_national_focus = SOV_a_new_dawn_for_the_union

        if = {

            if = {
                limit = {
                    has_country_flag = SOV_nat_russia_flag

                }
                country_event = { id = russia.2018 days = 45 }
                set_country_flag = SOV_natrus_alikhanov_event_flag
            }
        }
    }

#Alikhanov Annouces His Candidacy
country_event = {
    id = russia.2022
    title = russia.2022.t
    desc = russia.2022.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_alikhanov_election_campaign

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #hope he won't win
        name = russia.2022.a
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = fascist
            popularity = 0.01
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                        range = SOV_united_russia_electoral_approval_very_good
                    }
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                        range = SOV_united_russia_electoral_approval_ok
                    }
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                value = -0.05
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                OR = {
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                        range = SOV_people_russia_electoral_approval_very_good
                    }
                    is_power_balance_in_range = {
                        id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                        range = SOV_people_russia_electoral_approval_good
                    }
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                value = 0.05
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                    id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                    range = SOV_ur_middle
                }
                power_balance_value = {
                    id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                    value > 0
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                value = -0.05
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                is_power_balance_in_range = {
                    id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                    range = SOV_ur_middle
                }
                power_balance_value = {
                    id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                    value < 0
                }
            }
            add_power_balance_value = {
                id = SOV_medvedev_elections_balance
                value = 0.05
            }
        }
    }
}

                        days = 40
                        random_days = 15
                    }
                }

                        id = russia.2032
                        days = 40
                        random_days = 15
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

#Derzhavnik government collapses
country_event = {
    id = russia.2055
    title = russia.2055.t
    desc = russia.2055.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_revolution

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #the end of tyranny
        name = russia.2055.a
        hidden_effect = {
            clr_global_flag = SOV_alikhanov_leader_flag
            change_economy_type_planned_economy = yes
            set_country_flag = SOV_red_rebellion
            remove_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_dem_opposition_power_modifier
            }
            remove_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_left_wing_opposition_power_modifier
            }
            remove_power_balance = {
                id = SOV_alikhanov_power_balance
            }
            every_owned_state = {
                limit = {
                    is_core_of = UDM
                }
                remove_core_of = UDM
            }
            SOV = {
                annex_country = {
                    target = UDM
                    transfer_troops = no
                }
                every_owned_state = {
                    limit = {
                        is_demilitarized_zone = yes
                    }
                    set_demilitarized_zone = no
                }
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_global_flag = SOV_stalinist_uprising_flag
            }
            complete_national_focus = SOV_steel_revolution
            add_country_leader_role = {
                character = SOV_dmitry_puchkov
                promote_leader = yes
                country_leader = {
                    ideology = chekist_communism
                    expire = "1.1.1.1"
                    traits = {  }
                }
            }
            set_politics = {
                ruling_party = totalitarian_socialist
                elections_allowed = no
            }
            set_popularities = {
                totalitarian_socialist = 30
                fascist = 28
                social_liberal = 5
                social_democrat = 11
                authoritarian_democrat = 15
                nationalist = 11
            }
            set_global_flag = SOV_csto_red_flag
            set_party_name = {
                ideology = totalitarian_socialist
                name = SOV_puchkov_party
                long_name = SOV_puchkov_party_long
            }
            set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_stalinist
            set_country_flag = SOV_stalinist_revolution_flag
            focus_unlock = yes
            add_country_leader_role = {
                character = SOV_disorganized_leadership
                promote_leader = yes
                country_leader = {
                    ideology = derzhavism
                    expire = "1.1.1.1"
                    traits = { }
                }
            }
        }
        else = {
            set_country_flag = SOV_red_revolution_flag
            focus_unlock = yes
            complete_national_focus = SOV_end_of_tyranny
            custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
            change_government_type_revolutionary_front = yes
            hidden_effect = {
                news_event = { id = news.1927 hours = 3 }
                change_economy_type_planned_economy = yes
                SOV = {
                    annex_country = {
                        target = UDM
                        transfer_troops = no
                    }
                }
                set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_socialist_republic
                set_politics = {
                    ruling_party = libertarian_socialist
                    elections_allowed = no
                }
                add_country_leader_role = {
                    character = SOV_sergei_udaltsov
                    promote_leader = yes
                    country_leader = {
                        ideology = popular_front_socialism
                        expire = "1.1.1.1"
                        traits = { }
                    }
                }
                set_party_name = {
                    ideology = libertarian_socialist
                    name = SOV_united_left_bloc_party
                    long_name = SOV_united_left_bloc_party
                }
                set_party_name = {
                    ideology = totalitarian_socialist
                    name = SOV_united_left_bloc_party
                    long_name = SOV_united_left_bloc_party
                }
                set_party_name = {
                    ideology = communist
                    name = SOV_united_left_bloc_party
                    long_name = SOV_united_left_bloc_party
                }
                set_popularities = {
                    communist = 30
                    totalitarian_socialist = 20
                    libertarian_socialist = 50
                }
                add_popularity = {
                    ideology = fascist
                    popularity = 0.15
                }
                add_country_leader_role = {
                    character = SOV_disorganized_leadership
                    promote_leader = yes
                    country_leader = {
                        ideology = derzhavism
                        expire = "1.1.1.1"
                        traits = { }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

#Derzhavnik government wins
country_event = {
    id = russia.2056
    title = russia.2056.t
    desc = russia.2056.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_russian_elections_1

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #the end of communism
        name = russia.2056.a
        add_political_power = 100
        add_stability = -0.05
        add_manpower = -310
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = -0.1
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = libertarian_socialist
            popularity = -0.1
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = totalitarian_socialist
            popularity = -0.1
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_leader_with_trait = hos_lion_of_russia
            }
            swap_ruler_traits = {
                remove = hos_lion_of_russia
                add = hos_wounded_lion
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_leader_with_trait = hos_wounded_lion
            }
            swap_ruler_traits = {
                remove = hos_wounded_lion
                add = hos_wounded_lion_1
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_country_leader_trait = hos_wounded_lion
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            news_event = { id = news.1928 hours = 3 }
            set_portraits = {
                character = SOV_anton_alikhanov
                civilian = { large ="GFX_portrait_SOV_anton_alikhanov_vozhd_smoke" }
            }
            remove_dynamic_modifier = {
                modifier = SOV_left_wing_opposition_power_modifier
            }
            set_country_flag = SOV_left_opposition_alikhanov_destroyed_flag
            SOV = {
                annex_country = {
                    target = UDM
                    transfer_troops = no
                }
            }
            every_owned_state = {
                limit = {
                    is_demilitarized_zone = yes
                }
                set_demilitarized_zone = no
            }
            every_owned_state = {
                limit = {
                    is_core_of = UDM
                }
                remove_core_of = UDM
            }
        }
    }
}

        }
    }
    option = { #gather all our loyal forces
        name = russia.2060.b

        add_war_support = 0.05

                    id = russia.2062
                    days = 3
                }
            }
            20 = {
                country_event = {
                    id = russia.2061
                    days = 3
                }
            }
        }
    }
    option = { #attack with current loyal divisions
        name = russia.2060.c
        add_political_power = -50
        add_stability = -0.03
        add_war_support = 0.03

#Derzhavnik counter attack
country_event = {
    id = russia.2063
    title = russia.2063.t
    desc = russia.2063.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_tanks_in_city

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #URA
        name = russia.2063.a
        add_manpower = -307
        add_political_power = 25
        add_stability = 0.1
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_leader_with_trait = hos_lion_of_russia
            }
            swap_ruler_traits = {
                remove = hos_lion_of_russia
                add = hos_wounded_lion
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                has_country_leader_with_trait = hos_wounded_lion
            }
            swap_ruler_traits = {
                remove = hos_wounded_lion
                add = hos_wounded_lion_1
            }
        }
        else = {
            add_country_leader_trait = hos_wounded_lion
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            news_event = { id = news.1928 hours = 3 }
            set_portraits = {
                character = SOV_anton_alikhanov
                civilian = { large ="GFX_portrait_SOV_anton_alikhanov_vozhd_smoke" }
            }
            SOV = {
                annex_country = {
                    target = BSK
                    transfer_troops = no
                }
            }
            every_owned_state = {
                limit = {
                    is_demilitarized_zone = yes
                }
                set_demilitarized_zone = no
            }
            every_owned_state = {
                limit = {
                    is_core_of = BSK
                }
                remove_core_of = BSK
            }
        }
    }
}

#Party of the Proletariat
country_event = {
    id = russia.2116
    title = russia.2116.t
    desc = russia.2116.d
    picture = GFX_SOV_russian_elections

    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = {
    }
    option = { #stalinist larp
        name = russia.2116.a
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = communist
            long_name = SOV_medvedev_communist_party_long
            name = SOV_medvedev_communist_party_short
        }
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = totalitarian_socialist
            long_name = SOV_medvedev_communist_party_long
            name = SOV_medvedev_communist_party_short
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = totalitarian_socialist
            popularity = 0.1
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            ruling_party_wing_var_temp = token:totalitarian_socialist
        }
        add_ruling_party_wing = yes
        set_country_leader_ideology = anti_revisionist_communism
        unlock_decision_tooltip = SOV_subdue_caucasus
        unlock_decision_tooltip = SOV_subdue_baltics
        unlock_decision_tooltip = SOV_subdue_central_asia_puchkov
        unlock_decision_tooltip = SOV_subdue_ukraine
        hidden_effect = {
            set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_udaltsov_ussr
        }
    }
    option = { #trot larp
        name = russia.2116.b
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = communist
            long_name = SOV_rwp_party
            name = SOV_rwp_party_short
        }
        set_party_name = {
            ideology = libertarian_socialist
            long_name = SOV_rwp_party
            name = SOV_rwp_party_short
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = libertarian_socialist
            popularity = 0.1
        }
        set_temp_variable = {
            ruling_party_wing_var_temp = token:libertarian_socialist
        }
        add_ruling_party_wing = yes
        hidden_effect = {
            set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_udaltsov_neo_soviet
        }
    }
    option = { #leninist larp
        name = russia.2116.c
        random_list = {
            50 = {
                set_party_name = {
                    ideology = communist
                    long_name = SOV_medvedev_const_communist_long
                    name = SOV_medvedev_const_communist_short
                }
            }
            50 = {
                set_party_name = {
                    ideology = communist
                    long_name = SOV_russian_communist_party_long
                    name = SOV_russian_communist_party
                }
            }
        }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = communist
            popularity = 0.1
        }
        hidden_effect = {
            set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_udaltsov_neo_soviet
        }
    }

        }

            popularity = 0.05

    id = russiaflavor.71
    immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russiaflavor.71" }
    title = russiaflavor.71.t
    desc = russiaflavor.71.d
    #picture =

    is_triggered_only = yes
    fire_only_once = yes

    option = { #
        name = russiaflavor.71.a
        ai_chance = { factor = 1 }
        add_popularity = {
            ideology = fascist
            popularity = 0.01
        }
    }
}
